    };

    return cmocka_run_group_tests(tests, test_group_setup, test_group_teardown);
}
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

void other() {
    fprintf(stderr, "other\n");
    
}

void input() {
    char buffer[20];
    scanf("%s", buffer);
}

int main() {
    input();
    return 0;
}
#include "bmp.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct {
  uint16_t type;
  uint32_t size;
  uint32_t reserved;
  uint32_t offset;
} bmp_header_t;

typedef struct {
  uint32_t size;
  int32_t width;
  int32_t height;
  uint16_t planes;
  uint16_t bit_count;
  uint32_t compression;
  uint32_t image_size;
  uint32_t x_ppm;
  uint32_t y_ppm;
  uint32_t colors_used;
  uint32_t colors_important;
} bmp_info_t;
#pragma pack(pop)

static uint32_t calc_row_size(uint32_t width, uint16_t bit_count) {
  uint32_t bits = width * bit_count;
  return ((bits + 31) / 32) * 4;
}

void bmp_free(bmp_image_t *image) {
  if (!image)
    return;
  if (image->data)
    free(image->data);
  free(image);
}

bool bmp_is_valid(const bmp_image_t *image) {
  if (!image)
    return false;
  if (image->bit_count != 8 && image->bit_count != 24)
    return false;
  if (image->width <= 0 || image->height == 0)
    return false;
  if (!image->data)
    return false;
  return true;
}

bmp_image_t *bmp_read(const char *filename) {
  FILE *file = fopen(filename, "rb");
  if (!file) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot open file '%s'\n", filename);
    return NULL;
  }

  bmp_header_t header;
  bmp_info_t info;

  if (fread(&header, sizeof(header), 1, file) != 1 ||
      fread(&info, sizeof(info), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot read BMP headers from '%s'\n", filename);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (header.type != 0x4D42) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: File '%s' is not a BMP file (wrong signature)\n",
            filename);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (info.size != 40) {
    fprintf(
        stderr,
        "Error: Unsupported BMP header size in '%s' (%u bytes, expected 40)\n",
        filename, info.size);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (info.compression != 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Compression is not supported in '%s'\n", filename);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (info.planes != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Invalid number of planes in '%s' (%u, expected 1)\n",
            filename, info.planes);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (info.bit_count != 8 && info.bit_count != 24) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Unsupported bit depth in '%s' (%u bits, only 8 and 24 "
            "supported)\n",
            filename, info.bit_count);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (info.width == 0 || info.height == 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid image dimensions in '%s' (%dx%d)\n",
            filename, info.width, info.height);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  fseek(file, 0, SEEK_END);
  long file_size = ftell(file);

  if (header.size > (uint32_t)file_size) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: BMP header in '%s' claims file size %u bytes, but actual "
            "size is %ld bytes\n",
            filename, header.size, file_size);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  fseek(file, sizeof(header) + sizeof(info), SEEK_SET);

  bmp_image_t *image = malloc(sizeof(bmp_image_t));
  if (!image) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation failed for image structure\n");
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  image->width = info.width;
  image->height = info.height;
  image->bit_count = info.bit_count;
  image->row_size = calc_row_size((uint32_t)image->width, image->bit_count);

  if (image->bit_count == 8) {
    if (fread(image->palette, 4, 256, file) != 256) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot read palette from '%s'\n", filename);
      fclose(file);
      free(image);
      return NULL;
    }
  }

  uint32_t expected_data_size = image->row_size * image->height;

  if (header.offset + expected_data_size > header.size) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Image data in '%s' exceeds size claimed in BMP header\n",
            filename);
    fprintf(stderr, "  Offset: %u, Expected data size: %u, Header size: %u\n",
            header.offset, expected_data_size, header.size);
    fclose(file);
    free(image);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (header.offset + expected_data_size > (uint32_t)file_size) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Image data in '%s' exceeds file size\n", filename);
    fprintf(stderr, "  Offset: %u, Expected data size: %u, File size: %ld\n",
            header.offset, expected_data_size, file_size);
    fclose(file);
    free(image);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (header.offset > header.size ||
      header.offset < sizeof(header) + sizeof(info)) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid data offset in '%s' (%u)\n", filename,
            header.offset);
    fclose(file);
    free(image);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (fseek(file, header.offset, SEEK_SET) != 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot seek to pixel data in '%s' at offset %u\n",
            filename, header.offset);
    fclose(file);
    free(image);
    return NULL;
  }

  image->data = malloc(expected_data_size);
  if (!image->data) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Cannot allocate memory for pixel data in '%s' (%u bytes)\n",
            filename, expected_data_size);
    fclose(file);
    free(image);
    return NULL;
  }

  size_t bytes_read = fread(image->data, 1, expected_data_size, file);
  if (bytes_read != expected_data_size) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Cannot read pixel data from '%s' (read %zu of %u bytes)\n",
            filename, bytes_read, expected_data_size);
    fclose(file);
    free(image->data);
    free(image);
    return NULL;
  }

  fclose(file);
  return image;
}

bool bmp_write(const bmp_image_t *image, const char *filename) {
  if (!bmp_is_valid(image)) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid image\n");
    return false;
  }

  FILE *file = fopen(filename, "wb");
  if (!file) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot create file '%s'\n", filename);
    return false;
  }

  bmp_header_t header;
  bmp_info_t info;

  uint32_t palette_size = (image->bit_count == 8) ? 1024 : 0;
  uint32_t data_size = image->row_size * image->height;

  header.type = 0x4D42;
  header.size = sizeof(header) + sizeof(info) + palette_size + data_size;
  header.reserved = 0;
  header.offset = sizeof(header) + sizeof(info) + palette_size;

  info.size = 40;
  info.width = image->width;
  info.height = image->height;
  info.planes = 1;
  info.bit_count = image->bit_count;
  info.compression = 0;
  info.image_size = data_size;
  info.x_ppm = 0;
  info.y_ppm = 0;
  info.colors_used = (image->bit_count == 8) ? 256 : 0;
  info.colors_important = 0;

  fwrite(&header, sizeof(header), 1, file);
  fwrite(&info, sizeof(info), 1, file);

  if (image->bit_count == 8) {
    fwrite(image->palette, 4, 256, file);
  }

  fwrite(image->data, 1, data_size, file);

  fclose(file);
  return true;
}
#ifndef BMP_H
#define BMP_H

#include <stdbool.h>
#include <stdint.h>

typedef struct {
  int32_t width;
  int32_t height;
  uint16_t bit_count;
  uint32_t row_size;

  uint8_t *data;
  uint8_t palette[256][4];
} bmp_image_t;

bmp_image_t *bmp_read(const char *filename);
bool bmp_write(const bmp_image_t *image, const char *filename);
void bmp_free(bmp_image_t *image);

bool bmp_is_valid(const bmp_image_t *image);

#endif
#include "../bmp/bmp.h"
#include <stdio.h>

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
  if (argc != 3) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Expected 2 arguments\n");
    return 1;
  }

  bmp_image_t *img1 = bmp_read(argv[1]);
  bmp_image_t *img2 = bmp_read(argv[2]);

  if (!img1 || !img2) {
    if (img1)
      bmp_free(img1);
    if (img2)
      bmp_free(img2);
    return 1;
  }

  if (img1->bit_count != img2->bit_count) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Different bit depths\n");
    bmp_free(img1);
    bmp_free(img2);
    return 1;
  }

  if (img1->width != img2->width || img1->height != img2->height) {
    int32_t abs_height1 = (img1->height < 0) ? -img1->height : img1->height;
    int32_t abs_height2 = (img2->height < 0) ? -img2->height : img2->height;
    int32_t abs_width1 = (img1->width < 0) ? -img1->width : img1->width;
    int32_t abs_width2 = (img2->width < 0) ? -img2->width : img2->width;

    if (abs_width1 != abs_width2 || abs_height1 != abs_height2) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Different dimensions\n");
      bmp_free(img1);
      bmp_free(img2);
      return 1;
    }
  }

  int diff_count = 0;
  int max_diffs = 100;
  bool first_diff = true;

  int32_t abs_height1 = (img1->height < 0) ? -img1->height : img1->height;
  int32_t abs_width1 = (img1->width < 0) ? -img1->width : img1->width;

  for (int32_t y = 0; y < abs_height1; y++) {
    int32_t row_idx1 = (img1->height < 0) ? y : (abs_height1 - 1 - y);
    int32_t row_idx2 = (img2->height < 0) ? y : (abs_height1 - 1 - y);

    uint8_t *row1 = img1->data + row_idx1 * img1->row_size;
    uint8_t *row2 = img2->data + row_idx2 * img2->row_size;

    for (int32_t x = 0; x < abs_width1; x++) {
      bool equal = false;

      if (img1->bit_count == 8) {
        uint8_t idx1 = row1[x];
        uint8_t idx2 = row2[x];

        equal = (img1->palette[idx1][0] == img2->palette[idx2][0] &&
                 img1->palette[idx1][1] == img2->palette[idx2][1] &&
                 img1->palette[idx1][2] == img2->palette[idx2][2]);
      } else { // 24-bit
        uint8_t *px1 = row1 + x * 3;
        uint8_t *px2 = row2 + x * 3;

        equal = (px1[0] == px2[0] && // Blue
                 px1[1] == px2[1] && // Green
                 px1[2] == px2[2]);  // Red
      }

      if (!equal) {
        if (first_diff) {
          fprintf(stderr, "Next pixels are different:\n");
          first_diff = false;
        }
        fprintf(stderr, "x%-6d y%-6d\n", x, y);
        diff_count++;

        if (diff_count >= max_diffs) {
          y = img1->height;
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  bmp_free(img1);
  bmp_free(img2);

  if (diff_count == 0) {
    printf("Images are same\n");
    return 0;
  } else {
    return 2;
  }
}
#include "../bmp/bmp.h"
#include <stdio.h>

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
  if (argc != 3) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Expected 2 arguments\n");
    return 1;
  }

  bmp_image_t *image = bmp_read(argv[1]);
  if (!image) {
    return 1;
  }

  if (image->bit_count == 8) {
    for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
      image->palette[i][0] = 255 - image->palette[i][0]; // Blue
      image->palette[i][1] = 255 - image->palette[i][1]; // Green
      image->palette[i][2] = 255 - image->palette[i][2]; // Red
    }
  } else if (image->bit_count == 24) {
    for (int32_t y = 0; y < image->height; y++) {
      uint8_t *row = image->data + y * image->row_size;
      for (int32_t x = 0; x < image->width; x++) {
        uint8_t *pixel = row + x * 3;
        pixel[0] = 255 - pixel[0]; // Blue
        pixel[1] = 255 - pixel[1]; // Green
        pixel[2] = 255 - pixel[2]; // Red
      }
    }
  }

  if (!bmp_write(image, argv[2])) {
    bmp_free(image);
    return 1;
  }

  bmp_free(image);
  return 0;
}
#include "bmp.h"
#include <errno.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

#define BMP_TYPE 0x4D42

BMPImage *bmp_read(const char *filename) {
  FILE *file = fopen(filename, "rb");
  if (!file) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot open file '%s': %s\n", filename,
            strerror(errno));
    return NULL;
  }

  BMPImage *image = malloc(sizeof(BMPImage));
  if (!image) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation failed\n");
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (fread(&image->file_header, sizeof(BMPFileHeader), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot read BMP file header\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->file_header.type != BMP_TYPE) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Not a valid BMP file (wrong signature)\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (fread(&image->info_header, sizeof(BMPInfoHeader), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot read BMP info header\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.size != 40) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Unsupported BMP format (header size must be 40)\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel != 8 &&
      image->info_header.bits_per_pixel != 24) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Unsupported bit depth (%d). Only 8-bit and 24-bit are "
            "supported\n",
            image->info_header.bits_per_pixel);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.width <= 0 || image->info_header.height == 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid image dimensions (width=%d, height=%d)\n",
            image->info_header.width, image->info_header.height);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.compression != 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Compression is not supported\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  image->color_table = NULL;
  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8) {
    uint32_t color_table_size = image->info_header.colors_used;
    if (color_table_size == 0) {
      color_table_size = 256;
    }

    image->color_table = malloc(color_table_size * sizeof(RGBQuad));
    if (!image->color_table) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation for color table failed\n");
      free(image);
      fclose(file);
      return NULL;
    }

    size_t read_count =
        fread(image->color_table, sizeof(RGBQuad), color_table_size, file);
    if (read_count != color_table_size) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot read color table (expected %u, got %zu)\n",
              color_table_size, read_count);
      free(image->color_table);
      free(image);
      fclose(file);
      return NULL;
    }
  } else {
    fseek(file, image->file_header.offset, SEEK_SET);
  }

  image->row_size = bmp_calculate_row_size((uint32_t)image->info_header.width,
                                           image->info_header.bits_per_pixel);

  uint32_t height = (uint32_t)abs(image->info_header.height);
  image->actual_image_size = image->row_size * height;

  uint32_t required_size = image->file_header.offset + image->actual_image_size;
  if (required_size > image->file_header.size) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Image data exceeds size claimed in BMP header\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "  Offset: %u, Image data size: %u, Header file size: %u\n",
            image->file_header.offset, image->actual_image_size,
            image->file_header.size);
    if (image->color_table)
      free(image->color_table);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.image_size != 0) {
    if (image->info_header.image_size > image->actual_image_size) {
      uint32_t required_with_header_size =
          image->file_header.offset + image->info_header.image_size;
      if (required_with_header_size > image->file_header.size) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Error: Image size in header exceeds file size\n");
        if (image->color_table)
          free(image->color_table);
        free(image);
        fclose(file);
        return NULL;
      }
    }
  }

  image->pixel_data = malloc(image->actual_image_size);
  if (!image->pixel_data) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation for pixel data failed\n");
    if (image->color_table)
      free(image->color_table);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  size_t read_size =
      fread(image->pixel_data, 1, image->actual_image_size, file);
  if (read_size != image->actual_image_size) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Cannot read pixel data (expected %u bytes, got %zu)\n",
            image->actual_image_size, read_size);
    free(image->pixel_data);
    if (image->color_table)
      free(image->color_table);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  fclose(file);
  return image;
}

bool bmp_write(BMPImage *image, const char *filename) {
  if (!bmp_is_valid(image)) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid BMP image structure\n");
    return false;
  }

  FILE *file = fopen(filename, "wb");
  if (!file) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot create file '%s': %s\n", filename,
            strerror(errno));
    return false;
  }

  if (fwrite(&image->file_header, sizeof(BMPFileHeader), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot write BMP file header\n");
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  if (fwrite(&image->info_header, sizeof(BMPInfoHeader), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot write BMP info header\n");
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8 && image->color_table) {
    uint32_t color_table_size = image->info_header.colors_used;
    if (color_table_size == 0) {
      color_table_size = 256;
    }

    size_t written =
        fwrite(image->color_table, sizeof(RGBQuad), color_table_size, file);
    if (written != color_table_size) {
      fprintf(stderr,
              "Error: Cannot write color table (expected %u, wrote %zu)\n",
              color_table_size, written);
      fclose(file);
      return false;
    }
  }

  size_t written = fwrite(image->pixel_data, 1, image->actual_image_size, file);
  if (written != image->actual_image_size) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Cannot write pixel data (expected %u bytes, wrote %zu)\n",
            image->actual_image_size, written);
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  long current_size = ftell(file);
  if (current_size < 0) {
    perror("ftell");
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  if ((uint32_t)current_size < image->file_header.size) {
    uint32_t padding = image->file_header.size - (uint32_t)current_size;
    uint8_t zero = 0;
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < padding; i++) {
      if (fwrite(&zero, 1, 1, file) != 1) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot write padding\n");
        fclose(file);
        return false;
      }
    }
  } else if ((uint32_t)current_size > image->file_header.size) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Written file larger than header claims\n");
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  fclose(file);
  return true;
}

void bmp_free(BMPImage *image) {
  if (image) {
    if (image->color_table) {
      free(image->color_table);
    }
    if (image->pixel_data) {
      free(image->pixel_data);
    }
    free(image);
  }
}

bool bmp_is_valid(BMPImage *image) {
  if (!image)
    return false;
  if (image->file_header.type != BMP_TYPE)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.size != 40)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel != 8 &&
      image->info_header.bits_per_pixel != 24)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.width <= 0)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.height == 0)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.compression != 0)
    return false;
  if (!image->pixel_data)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8 && !image->color_table)
    return false;

  uint32_t calculated_row_size = bmp_calculate_row_size(
      (uint32_t)image->info_header.width, image->info_header.bits_per_pixel);
  if (image->row_size != calculated_row_size)
    return false;

  uint32_t height = (uint32_t)abs(image->info_header.height);
  uint32_t calculated_image_size = image->row_size * height;
  if (image->actual_image_size != calculated_image_size)
    return false;

  if (image->info_header.image_size != 0 &&
      image->info_header.image_size != calculated_image_size) {
    if (image->info_header.image_size > calculated_image_size) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  return true;
}

uint8_t *bmp_get_pixel_address(BMPImage *image, int32_t x, int32_t y) {
  if (!image || !image->pixel_data)
    return NULL;
  if (x < 0 || x >= image->info_header.width)
    return NULL;

  int32_t height_abs = abs(image->info_header.height);
  if (y < 0 || y >= height_abs)
    return NULL;

  uint32_t memory_row;
  if (image->info_header.height > 0) {
    memory_row = (uint32_t)y;
  } else {
    memory_row = (uint32_t)(height_abs - 1 - y);
  }

  uint32_t pixel_size = image->info_header.bits_per_pixel / 8;
  if (pixel_size == 0)
    pixel_size = 1;

  uint32_t offset = memory_row * image->row_size + (uint32_t)x * pixel_size;

  if (offset >= image->actual_image_size)
    return NULL;

  return image->pixel_data + offset;
}

bool bmp_is_same_format(BMPImage *img1, BMPImage *img2) {
  if (!img1 || !img2)
    return false;

  return (img1->info_header.bits_per_pixel == img2->info_header.bits_per_pixel);
}

uint32_t bmp_calculate_row_size(uint32_t width, uint16_t bpp) {
  uint32_t row_size = (width * bpp + 7) / 8;
  return (row_size + 3) & ~3;
}
#include "bmp.h"
#include <errno.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

#define BMP_TYPE 0x4D42

BMPImage *bmp_read(const char *filename) {
  FILE *file = fopen(filename, "rb");
  if (!file) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot open file '%s': %s\n", filename,
            strerror(errno));
    return NULL;
  }

  BMPImage *image = malloc(sizeof(BMPImage));
  if (!image) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation failed\n");
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (fread(&image->file_header, sizeof(BMPFileHeader), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot read BMP file header\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->file_header.type != BMP_TYPE) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Not a valid BMP file (wrong signature)\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (fread(&image->info_header, sizeof(BMPInfoHeader), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot read BMP info header\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.size != 40) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Unsupported BMP format (header size must be 40)\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel != 8 &&
      image->info_header.bits_per_pixel != 24) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Unsupported bit depth (%d). Only 8-bit and 24-bit are "
            "supported\n",
            image->info_header.bits_per_pixel);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.width <= 0 || image->info_header.height == 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid image dimensions (width=%d, height=%d)\n",
            image->info_header.width, image->info_header.height);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.compression != 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Compression is not supported\n");
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  image->color_table = NULL;
  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8) {
    uint32_t color_table_size = image->info_header.colors_used;
    if (color_table_size == 0) {
      color_table_size = 256;
    }

    image->color_table = malloc(color_table_size * sizeof(RGBQuad));
    if (!image->color_table) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation for color table failed\n");
      free(image);
      fclose(file);
      return NULL;
    }

    size_t read_count =
        fread(image->color_table, sizeof(RGBQuad), color_table_size, file);
    if (read_count != color_table_size) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot read color table (expected %u, got %zu)\n",
              color_table_size, read_count);
      free(image->color_table);
      free(image);
      fclose(file);
      return NULL;
    }
  } else {
    fseek(file, image->file_header.offset, SEEK_SET);
  }

  image->row_size = bmp_calculate_row_size((uint32_t)image->info_header.width,
                                           image->info_header.bits_per_pixel);

  uint32_t height = (uint32_t)abs(image->info_header.height);
  image->actual_image_size = image->row_size * height;

  uint32_t required_size = image->file_header.offset + image->actual_image_size;
  if (required_size > image->file_header.size) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Image data exceeds size claimed in BMP header\n");
    fprintf(stderr, "  Offset: %u, Image data size: %u, Header file size: %u\n",
            image->file_header.offset, image->actual_image_size,
            image->file_header.size);
    if (image->color_table)
      free(image->color_table);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  if (image->info_header.image_size != 0) {
    if (image->info_header.image_size > image->actual_image_size) {
      uint32_t required_with_header_size =
          image->file_header.offset + image->info_header.image_size;
      if (required_with_header_size > image->file_header.size) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Error: Image size in header exceeds file size\n");
        if (image->color_table)
          free(image->color_table);
        free(image);
        fclose(file);
        return NULL;
      }
    }
  }

  image->pixel_data = malloc(image->actual_image_size);
  if (!image->pixel_data) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation for pixel data failed\n");
    if (image->color_table)
      free(image->color_table);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  size_t read_size =
      fread(image->pixel_data, 1, image->actual_image_size, file);
  if (read_size != image->actual_image_size) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Cannot read pixel data (expected %u bytes, got %zu)\n",
            image->actual_image_size, read_size);
    free(image->pixel_data);
    if (image->color_table)
      free(image->color_table);
    free(image);
    fclose(file);
    return NULL;
  }

  fclose(file);
  return image;
}

bool bmp_write(BMPImage *image, const char *filename) {
  if (!bmp_is_valid(image)) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid BMP image structure\n");
    return false;
  }

  FILE *file = fopen(filename, "wb");
  if (!file) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot create file '%s': %s\n", filename,
            strerror(errno));
    return false;
  }

  if (fwrite(&image->file_header, sizeof(BMPFileHeader), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot write BMP file header\n");
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  if (fwrite(&image->info_header, sizeof(BMPInfoHeader), 1, file) != 1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot write BMP info header\n");
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8 && image->color_table) {
    uint32_t color_table_size = image->info_header.colors_used;
    if (color_table_size == 0) {
      color_table_size = 256;
    }

    size_t written =
        fwrite(image->color_table, sizeof(RGBQuad), color_table_size, file);
    if (written != color_table_size) {
      fprintf(stderr,
              "Error: Cannot write color table (expected %u, wrote %zu)\n",
              color_table_size, written);
      fclose(file);
      return false;
    }
  }

  size_t written = fwrite(image->pixel_data, 1, image->actual_image_size, file);
  if (written != image->actual_image_size) {
    fprintf(stderr,
            "Error: Cannot write pixel data (expected %u bytes, wrote %zu)\n",
            image->actual_image_size, written);
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  long current_size = ftell(file);
  if (current_size < 0) {
    perror("ftell");
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  if ((uint32_t)current_size < image->file_header.size) {
    uint32_t padding = image->file_header.size - (uint32_t)current_size;
    uint8_t zero = 0;
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < padding; i++) {
      if (fwrite(&zero, 1, 1, file) != 1) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Error: Cannot write padding\n");
        fclose(file);
        return false;
      }
    }
  } else if ((uint32_t)current_size > image->file_header.size) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Written file larger than header claims\n");
    fclose(file);
    return false;
  }

  fclose(file);
  return true;
}

void bmp_free(BMPImage *image) {
  if (image) {
    if (image->color_table) {
      free(image->color_table);
    }
    if (image->pixel_data) {
      free(image->pixel_data);
    }
    free(image);
  }
}

bool bmp_is_valid(BMPImage *image) {
  if (!image)
    return false;
  if (image->file_header.type != BMP_TYPE)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.size != 40)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel != 8 &&
      image->info_header.bits_per_pixel != 24)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.width <= 0)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.height == 0)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.compression != 0)
    return false;
  if (!image->pixel_data)
    return false;
  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8 && !image->color_table)
    return false;

  uint32_t calculated_row_size = bmp_calculate_row_size(
      (uint32_t)image->info_header.width, image->info_header.bits_per_pixel);
  if (image->row_size != calculated_row_size)
    return false;

  uint32_t height = (uint32_t)abs(image->info_header.height);
  uint32_t calculated_image_size = image->row_size * height;
  if (image->actual_image_size != calculated_image_size)
    return false;

  if (image->info_header.image_size != 0 &&
      image->info_header.image_size != calculated_image_size) {
    if (image->info_header.image_size > calculated_image_size) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  return true;
}

uint8_t *bmp_get_pixel_address(BMPImage *image, int32_t x, int32_t y) {
  if (!image || !image->pixel_data)
    return NULL;
  if (x < 0 || x >= image->info_header.width)
    return NULL;

  int32_t height_abs = abs(image->info_header.height);
  if (y < 0 || y >= height_abs)
    return NULL;

  uint32_t memory_row;
  if (image->info_header.height > 0) {
    memory_row = (uint32_t)y;
  } else {
    memory_row = (uint32_t)(height_abs - 1 - y);
  }

  uint32_t pixel_size = image->info_header.bits_per_pixel / 8;
  if (pixel_size == 0)
    pixel_size = 1;

  uint32_t offset = memory_row * image->row_size + (uint32_t)x * pixel_size;

  if (offset >= image->actual_image_size)
    return NULL;

  return image->pixel_data + offset;
}

bool bmp_is_same_format(BMPImage *img1, BMPImage *img2) {
  if (!img1 || !img2)
    return false;

  return (img1->info_header.bits_per_pixel == img2->info_header.bits_per_pixel);
}

uint32_t bmp_calculate_row_size(uint32_t width, uint16_t bpp) {
  uint32_t row_size = (width * bpp + 7) / 8;
  return (row_size + 3) & ~3;
}
#ifndef BMP_H
#define BMP_H

#include <stdbool.h>
#include <stdint.h>

#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct {
  uint16_t type; // "BM"
  uint32_t size; // File size in bytes
  uint16_t reserved1;
  uint16_t reserved2;
  uint32_t offset; // Offset to pixel data
} BMPFileHeader;

typedef struct {
  uint32_t size;              // Header size (must be 40)
  int32_t width;              // Image width in pixels
  int32_t height;             // Image height in pixels (positive = bottom-up)
  uint16_t planes;            // Number of color planes (must be 1)
  uint16_t bits_per_pixel;    // (8 or 24)
  uint32_t compression;       // Compression type (0 = none)
  uint32_t image_size;        // Image size in bytes (0 for uncompressed)
  int32_t x_pixels_per_meter; // Horizontal resolution
  int32_t y_pixels_per_meter; // Vertical resolution
  uint32_t colors_used;       // Number of colors in palette
  uint32_t colors_important;
} BMPInfoHeader;

typedef struct {
  uint8_t blue;
  uint8_t green;
  uint8_t red;
  uint8_t reserved; // Should be 0
} RGBQuad;
#pragma pack(pop)

typedef struct {
  BMPFileHeader file_header;
  BMPInfoHeader info_header;
  RGBQuad *color_table; // For 8-bit images
  uint8_t *pixel_data;
  uint32_t row_size;          // Size of one row in bytes (with padding)
  uint32_t actual_image_size; // Actual image data size
} BMPImage;

BMPImage *bmp_read(const char *filename);
bool bmp_write(BMPImage *image, const char *filename);
void bmp_free(BMPImage *image);
bool bmp_is_valid(BMPImage *image);
uint8_t *bmp_get_pixel_address(BMPImage *image, int32_t x, int32_t y);
bool bmp_is_same_format(BMPImage *img1, BMPImage *img2);
uint32_t bmp_calculate_row_size(uint32_t width, uint16_t bpp);

#endif
#ifndef BMP_H
#define BMP_H

#include <stdbool.h>
#include <stdint.h>

#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct {
  uint16_t type; // "BM"
  uint32_t size; // File size in bytes
  uint16_t reserved1;
  uint16_t reserved2;
  uint32_t offset; // Offset to pixel data
} BMPFileHeader;

typedef struct {
  uint32_t size;              // Header size (must be 40)
  int32_t width;              // Image width in pixels
  int32_t height;             // Image height in pixels (positive = bottom-up)
  uint16_t planes;            // Number of color planes (must be 1)
  uint16_t bits_per_pixel;    // (8 or 24)
  uint32_t compression;       // Compression type (0 = none)
  uint32_t image_size;        // Image size in bytes (0 for uncompressed)
  int32_t x_pixels_per_meter; // Horizontal resolution
  int32_t y_pixels_per_meter; // Vertical resolution
  uint32_t colors_used;       // Number of colors in palette
  uint32_t colors_important;
} BMPInfoHeader;

typedef struct {
  uint8_t blue;
  uint8_t green;
  uint8_t red;
  uint8_t reserved; // Should be 0
} RGBQuad;
#pragma pack(pop)

typedef struct {
  BMPFileHeader file_header;
  BMPInfoHeader info_header;
  RGBQuad *color_table; // For 8-bit images
  uint8_t *pixel_data;
  uint32_t row_size;          // Size of one row in bytes (with padding)
  uint32_t actual_image_size; // Actual image data size
} BMPImage;

BMPImage *bmp_read(const char *filename);
bool bmp_write(BMPImage *image, const char *filename);
void bmp_free(BMPImage *image);
bool bmp_is_valid(BMPImage *image);
uint8_t *bmp_get_pixel_address(BMPImage *image, int32_t x, int32_t y);
bool bmp_is_same_format(BMPImage *img1, BMPImage *img2);
uint32_t bmp_calculate_row_size(uint32_t width, uint16_t bpp);

#endif
#include "../bmp/bmp.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

bool bmp_compare(BMPImage *img1, BMPImage *img2, uint32_t max_differences,
                 uint32_t *differences_found, int32_t **diff_coords_x,
                 int32_t **diff_coords_y) {
  if (!bmp_is_valid(img1) || !bmp_is_valid(img2)) {
    return false;
  }

  if (img1->info_header.bits_per_pixel != img2->info_header.bits_per_pixel) {
    return false;
  }

  if (img1->info_header.width != img2->info_header.width ||
      abs(img1->info_header.height) != abs(img2->info_header.height)) {
    return false;
  }

  *differences_found = 0;
  *diff_coords_x = malloc(max_differences * sizeof(int32_t));
  *diff_coords_y = malloc(max_differences * sizeof(int32_t));

  if (!*diff_coords_x || !*diff_coords_y) {
    free(*diff_coords_x);
    free(*diff_coords_y);
    *diff_coords_x = NULL;
    *diff_coords_y = NULL;
    return false;
  }

  int32_t width = img1->info_header.width;
  uint32_t height = (uint32_t)abs(img1->info_header.height);

  for (uint32_t y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (int32_t x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      uint8_t *pixel1 = bmp_get_pixel_address(img1, x, (int32_t)y);
      uint8_t *pixel2 = bmp_get_pixel_address(img2, x, (int32_t)y);

      if (!pixel1 || !pixel2) {
        continue;
      }

      bool different = false;

      if (img1->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8) {
        uint8_t idx1 = *pixel1;
        uint8_t idx2 = *pixel2;

        uint32_t colors1 =
            img1->info_header.colors_used ? img1->info_header.colors_used : 256;
        uint32_t colors2 =
            img2->info_header.colors_used ? img2->info_header.colors_used : 256;

        if (idx1 >= colors1 || idx2 >= colors2) {
          different = true;
        } else {
          RGBQuad c1 = img1->color_table[idx1];
          RGBQuad c2 = img2->color_table[idx2];
          if (c1.red != c2.red || c1.green != c2.green || c1.blue != c2.blue) {
            different = true;
          }
        }
      } else {
        if (pixel1[0] != pixel2[0] || pixel1[1] != pixel2[1] ||
            pixel1[2] != pixel2[2]) {
          different = true;
        }
      }

      if (different) {
        int32_t output_y = (int32_t)y;

        (*diff_coords_x)[*differences_found] = x;
        (*diff_coords_y)[*differences_found] = output_y;
        (*differences_found)++;

        if (*differences_found >= max_differences) {
          return true;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  return true;
}

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
  if (argc != 3) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Expected 2 arguments\n");
    return 1;
  }

  const char *filename1 = argv[1];
  const char *filename2 = argv[2];

  BMPImage *image1 = bmp_read(filename1);
  if (!image1) {
    return 1;
  }

  BMPImage *image2 = bmp_read(filename2);
  if (!image2) {
    bmp_free(image1);
    return 1;
  }

  uint32_t differences_found = 0;
  int32_t *diff_coords_x = NULL;
  int32_t *diff_coords_y = NULL;

  const uint32_t max_differences = 100;

  if (!bmp_compare(image1, image2, max_differences, &differences_found,
                   &diff_coords_x, &diff_coords_y)) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Images have different dimensions or bit depths\n");
    bmp_free(image1);
    bmp_free(image2);
    free(diff_coords_x);
    free(diff_coords_y);
    return 1;
  }

  if (differences_found == 0) {
    printf("Images are same\n");
    bmp_free(image1);
    bmp_free(image2);
    free(diff_coords_x);
    free(diff_coords_y);
    return 0;
  } else {
    fprintf(stderr, "Next pixels are different:\n");
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < differences_found; i++) {
      fprintf(stderr, "x%-6d y%-6d\n", diff_coords_x[i], diff_coords_y[i]);
    }

    bmp_free(image1);
    bmp_free(image2);
    free(diff_coords_x);
    free(diff_coords_y);
    return 2;
  }
}
#include "../bmp/bmp.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

bool bmp_compare(BMPImage *img1, BMPImage *img2, uint32_t max_differences,
                 uint32_t *differences_found, int32_t **diff_coords_x,
                 int32_t **diff_coords_y) {
  if (!bmp_is_valid(img1) || !bmp_is_valid(img2)) {
    return false;
  }

  if (img1->info_header.bits_per_pixel != img2->info_header.bits_per_pixel) {
    return false;
  }

  if (img1->info_header.width != img2->info_header.width ||
      abs(img1->info_header.height) != abs(img2->info_header.height)) {
    return false;
  }

  *differences_found = 0;
  *diff_coords_x = malloc(max_differences * sizeof(int32_t));
  *diff_coords_y = malloc(max_differences * sizeof(int32_t));

  if (!*diff_coords_x || !*diff_coords_y) {
    free(*diff_coords_x);
    free(*diff_coords_y);
    *diff_coords_x = NULL;
    *diff_coords_y = NULL;
    return false;
  }

  int32_t width = img1->info_header.width;
  uint32_t height = (uint32_t)abs(img1->info_header.height);

  for (uint32_t y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (int32_t x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      uint8_t *pixel1 = bmp_get_pixel_address(img1, x, (int32_t)y);
      uint8_t *pixel2 = bmp_get_pixel_address(img2, x, (int32_t)y);

      if (!pixel1 || !pixel2) {
        continue;
      }

      bool different = false;

      if (img1->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8) {
        uint8_t idx1 = *pixel1;
        uint8_t idx2 = *pixel2;

        uint32_t colors1 =
            img1->info_header.colors_used ? img1->info_header.colors_used : 256;
        uint32_t colors2 =
            img2->info_header.colors_used ? img2->info_header.colors_used : 256;

        if (idx1 >= colors1 || idx2 >= colors2) {
          different = true;
        } else {
          RGBQuad c1 = img1->color_table[idx1];
          RGBQuad c2 = img2->color_table[idx2];
          if (c1.red != c2.red || c1.green != c2.green || c1.blue != c2.blue) {
            different = true;
          }
        }
      } else {
        if (pixel1[0] != pixel2[0] || pixel1[1] != pixel2[1] ||
            pixel1[2] != pixel2[2]) {
          different = true;
        }
      }

      if (different) {
        int32_t output_y = (int32_t)y;

        (*diff_coords_x)[*differences_found] = x;
        (*diff_coords_y)[*differences_found] = output_y;
        (*differences_found)++;

        if (*differences_found >= max_differences) {
          return true;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  return true;
}

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
  if (argc != 3) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Expected 2 arguments\n");
    return 1;
  }

  const char *filename1 = argv[1];
  const char *filename2 = argv[2];

  BMPImage *image1 = bmp_read(filename1);
  if (!image1) {
    return 1;
  }

  BMPImage *image2 = bmp_read(filename2);
  if (!image2) {
    bmp_free(image1);
    return 1;
  }

  uint32_t differences_found = 0;
  int32_t *diff_coords_x = NULL;
  int32_t *diff_coords_y = NULL;

  const uint32_t max_differences = 100;

  if (!bmp_compare(image1, image2, max_differences, &differences_found,
                   &diff_coords_x, &diff_coords_y)) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Images have different dimensions or bit depths\n");
    bmp_free(image1);
    bmp_free(image2);
    free(diff_coords_x);
    free(diff_coords_y);
    return 1;
  }

  if (differences_found == 0) {
    printf("Images are same\n");
    bmp_free(image1);
    bmp_free(image2);
    free(diff_coords_x);
    free(diff_coords_y);
    return 0;
  } else {
    fprintf(stderr, "Next pixels are different:\n");
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < differences_found; i++) {
      fprintf(stderr, "x%-6d y%-6d\n", diff_coords_x[i], diff_coords_y[i]);
    }

    bmp_free(image1);
    bmp_free(image2);
    free(diff_coords_x);
    free(diff_coords_y);
    return 2;
  }
}
#include "../bmp/bmp.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
  if (argc != 3) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Expected 2 arguments\n");
    return 1;
  }

  const char *input_filename = argv[1];
  const char *output_filename = argv[2];

  if (strcmp(input_filename, output_filename) == 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Input and output files must be different\n");
    return 1;
  }

  BMPImage *image = bmp_read(input_filename);
  if (!image) {
    return 1;
  }

  if (!bmp_is_valid(image)) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid input image for negative conversion\n");
    bmp_free(image);
    return 1;
  }

  BMPImage *negative = malloc(sizeof(BMPImage));
  if (!negative) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation failed\n");
    bmp_free(image);
    return 1;
  }

  negative->file_header = image->file_header;
  negative->info_header = image->info_header;
  negative->row_size = image->row_size;
  negative->actual_image_size = image->actual_image_size;

  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8) {
    uint32_t color_table_size = image->info_header.colors_used;
    if (color_table_size == 0) {
      color_table_size = 256;
    }

    negative->color_table = malloc(color_table_size * sizeof(RGBQuad));
    if (!negative->color_table) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation for color table failed\n");
      free(negative);
      bmp_free(image);
      return 1;
    }

    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < color_table_size; i++) {
      negative->color_table[i].blue = 255 - image->color_table[i].blue;
      negative->color_table[i].green = 255 - image->color_table[i].green;
      negative->color_table[i].red = 255 - image->color_table[i].red;
      negative->color_table[i].reserved = 0;
    }
  } else {
    negative->color_table = NULL;
  }

  negative->pixel_data = malloc(negative->actual_image_size);
  if (!negative->pixel_data) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation for pixel data failed\n");
    if (negative->color_table)
      free(negative->color_table);
    free(negative);
    bmp_free(image);
    return 1;
  }

  memcpy(negative->pixel_data, image->pixel_data, negative->actual_image_size);

  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 24) {
    uint32_t height = (uint32_t)abs(image->info_header.height);
    for (uint32_t y = 0; y < height; y++) {
      for (int32_t x = 0; x < image->info_header.width; x++) {
        uint8_t *pixel = bmp_get_pixel_address(negative, x, (int32_t)y);
        if (pixel) {
          pixel[0] = 255 - pixel[0]; // Blue
          pixel[1] = 255 - pixel[1]; // Green
          pixel[2] = 255 - pixel[2]; // Red
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (!bmp_write(negative, output_filename)) {
    bmp_free(image);
    bmp_free(negative);
    return 1;
  }

  bmp_free(image);
  bmp_free(negative);

  return 0;
}
#include "../bmp/bmp.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
  if (argc != 3) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Expected 2 arguments\n");
    return 1;
  }

  const char *input_filename = argv[1];
  const char *output_filename = argv[2];

  if (strcmp(input_filename, output_filename) == 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Input and output files must be different\n");
    return 1;
  }

  BMPImage *image = bmp_read(input_filename);
  if (!image) {
    return 1;
  }

  if (!bmp_is_valid(image)) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid input image for negative conversion\n");
    bmp_free(image);
    return 1;
  }

  BMPImage *negative = malloc(sizeof(BMPImage));
  if (!negative) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation failed\n");
    bmp_free(image);
    return 1;
  }

  negative->file_header = image->file_header;
  negative->info_header = image->info_header;
  negative->row_size = image->row_size;
  negative->actual_image_size = image->actual_image_size;

  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 8) {
    uint32_t color_table_size = image->info_header.colors_used;
    if (color_table_size == 0) {
      color_table_size = 256;
    }

    negative->color_table = malloc(color_table_size * sizeof(RGBQuad));
    if (!negative->color_table) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation for color table failed\n");
      free(negative);
      bmp_free(image);
      return 1;
    }

    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < color_table_size; i++) {
      negative->color_table[i].blue = 255 - image->color_table[i].blue;
      negative->color_table[i].green = 255 - image->color_table[i].green;
      negative->color_table[i].red = 255 - image->color_table[i].red;
      negative->color_table[i].reserved = 0;
    }
  } else {
    negative->color_table = NULL;
  }

  negative->pixel_data = malloc(negative->actual_image_size);
  if (!negative->pixel_data) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Memory allocation for pixel data failed\n");
    if (negative->color_table)
      free(negative->color_table);
    free(negative);
    bmp_free(image);
    return 1;
  }

  memcpy(negative->pixel_data, image->pixel_data, negative->actual_image_size);

  if (image->info_header.bits_per_pixel == 24) {
    uint32_t height = (uint32_t)abs(image->info_header.height);
    for (uint32_t y = 0; y < height; y++) {
      for (int32_t x = 0; x < image->info_header.width; x++) {
        uint8_t *pixel = bmp_get_pixel_address(negative, x, (int32_t)y);
        if (pixel) {
          pixel[0] = 255 - pixel[0]; // Blue
          pixel[1] = 255 - pixel[1]; // Green
          pixel[2] = 255 - pixel[2]; // Red
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (!bmp_write(negative, output_filename)) {
    bmp_free(image);
    bmp_free(negative);
    return 1;
  }

  bmp_free(image);
  bmp_free(negative);

  return 0;
}
#include <ctype.h>
#include <limits.h>
#include <stdbool.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <sys/types.h>

#define BASE 1000000000
#define BASE_DIGITS 9

typedef struct DigitNode {
  int chunk;
  struct DigitNode *next;
  struct DigitNode *prev;
} DigitNode;

typedef struct {
  DigitNode *head;
  DigitNode *tail;
  int length;
  bool is_negative;
} BigNumber;

typedef struct StackNode {
  BigNumber *number;
  struct StackNode *next;
} StackNode;

typedef struct {
  StackNode *top;
  int size;
} NumberStack;

DigitNode *create_node(int chunk) {
  if (chunk < 0 || chunk >= BASE) {
    return NULL;
  }

  DigitNode *node = (DigitNode *)malloc(sizeof(DigitNode));
  if (!node)
    return NULL;

  node->chunk = chunk;
  node->next = NULL;
  node->prev = NULL;
  return node;
}

void free_bignum(BigNumber *num) {
  if (!num)
    return;

  DigitNode *current = num->head;
  while (current) {
    DigitNode *next = current->next;
    free(current);
    current = next;
  }
  free(num);
}

BigNumber *create_bignum_from_string(const char *str) {
  BigNumber *num = (BigNumber *)calloc(1, sizeof(BigNumber));
  if (!num)
    return NULL;

  int start = 0;
  if (str[0] == '-') {
    num->is_negative = true;
    start = 1;
  }

  if (str[start] == '\0') {
    free(num);
    return NULL;
  }

  size_t raw_len = strlen(str);
  if (raw_len > (size_t)INT_MAX) {
    free(num);
    return NULL;
  }
  int len = (int)(raw_len);

  for (int i = len; i > start;) {
    int chunk_start = (i - BASE_DIGITS > start) ? i - BASE_DIGITS : start;
    int chunk_len = i - chunk_start;

    char chunk_str[BASE_DIGITS + 1] = {0};
    strncpy(chunk_str, str + chunk_start, chunk_len);
    chunk_str[chunk_len] = '\0';

    char *endptr;
    long val = strtol(chunk_str, &endptr, 10);

    if (endptr == chunk_str || *endptr != '\0' || val < 0 || val >= BASE) {
      free_bignum(num);
      return NULL;
    }
    int chunk = (int)val;

    DigitNode *node = create_node(chunk);
    if (!node) {
      free_bignum(num);
      return NULL;
    }

    if (num->length == 0) {
      num->head = node;
      num->tail = node;
    } else {
      node->prev = num->tail;
      num->tail->next = node;
      num->tail = node;
    }
    num->length++;

    i = chunk_start;
  }

  if (num->length == 0) {
    DigitNode *zero = create_node(0);
    num->head = zero;
    num->tail = zero;
    num->length = 1;
    num->is_negative = false;
  } else {
    while (num->length > 1 && num->tail->chunk == 0) {
      DigitNode *prev = num->tail->prev;
      free(num->tail);
      num->tail = prev;
      num->tail->next = NULL;
      num->length--;
    }
    if (num->length == 1 && num->head->chunk == 0) {
      num->is_negative = false;
    }
  }

  return num;
}

NumberStack *create_stack(void) {
  NumberStack *stack = (NumberStack *)malloc(sizeof(NumberStack));
  if (stack) {
    stack->top = NULL;
    stack->size = 0;
  }
  return stack;
}

void push(NumberStack *stack, BigNumber *num) {
  StackNode *node = (StackNode *)malloc(sizeof(StackNode));
  if (!node)
    return;

  node->number = num;
  node->next = stack->top;
  stack->top = node;
  stack->size++;
}

BigNumber *pop(NumberStack *stack) {
  if (!stack || !stack->top)
    return NULL;

  StackNode *node = stack->top;
  BigNumber *num = node->number;
  stack->top = node->next;
  free(node);
  stack->size--;
  return num;
}

void free_stack(NumberStack *stack) {
  while (stack->top) {
    StackNode *node = stack->top;
    stack->top = node->next;
    free_bignum(node->number);
    free(node);
  }
  free(stack);
}

int compare_abs(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  if (a->length != b->length) {
    return a->length > b->length ? 1 : -1;
  }

  DigitNode *node_a = a->tail;
  DigitNode *node_b = b->tail;

  while (node_a && node_b) {
    if (node_a->chunk != node_b->chunk) {
      return node_a->chunk > node_b->chunk ? 1 : -1;
    }
    node_a = node_a->prev;
    node_b = node_b->prev;
  }
  return 0;
}

BigNumber *add_abs(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  BigNumber *result = (BigNumber *)calloc(1, sizeof(BigNumber));
  if (!result)
    return NULL;

  DigitNode *node_a = a->head;
  DigitNode *node_b = b->head;
  int carry = 0;

  while (node_a || node_b || carry) {
    int sum = carry;
    if (node_a) {
      sum += node_a->chunk;
      node_a = node_a->next;
    }
    if (node_b) {
      sum += node_b->chunk;
      node_b = node_b->next;
    }

    carry = sum / BASE;
    int chunk = sum % BASE;

    DigitNode *new_node = create_node(chunk);
    if (!new_node) {
      free_bignum(result);
      return NULL;
    }

    if (result->length == 0) {
      result->head = new_node;
      result->tail = new_node;
    } else {
      new_node->prev = result->tail;
      result->tail->next = new_node;
      result->tail = new_node;
    }
    result->length++;
  }

  return result;
}

BigNumber *subtract_abs(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  BigNumber *result = (BigNumber *)calloc(1, sizeof(BigNumber));
  if (!result)
    return NULL;

  DigitNode *node_a = a->head;
  DigitNode *node_b = b->head;
  int borrow = 0;

  while (node_a || node_b) {
    int diff = (node_a ? node_a->chunk : 0) - borrow;
    if (node_b) {
      diff -= node_b->chunk;
    }

    if (diff < 0) {
      diff += BASE;
      borrow = 1;
    } else {
      borrow = 0;
    }

    DigitNode *new_node = create_node(diff);
    if (!new_node) {
      free_bignum(result);
      return NULL;
    }

    if (result->length == 0) {
      result->head = new_node;
      result->tail = new_node;
    } else {
      new_node->prev = result->tail;
      result->tail->next = new_node;
      result->tail = new_node;
    }
    result->length++;

    if (node_a)
      node_a = node_a->next;
    if (node_b)
      node_b = node_b->next;
  }

  while (result->tail != result->head && result->tail->chunk == 0) {
    DigitNode *prev = result->tail->prev;
    free(result->tail);
    result->tail = prev;
    result->tail->next = NULL;
    result->length--;
  }

  return result;
}

BigNumber *add(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  if (a->is_negative == b->is_negative) {
    BigNumber *result = add_abs(a, b);
    if (result) {
      result->is_negative = a->is_negative;
    }
    return result;
  } else {
    int cmp = compare_abs(a, b);
    if (cmp == 0) {
      return create_bignum_from_string("0");
    } else if (cmp > 0) {
      BigNumber *result = subtract_abs(a, b);
      if (result) {
        result->is_negative = a->is_negative;
      }
      return result;
    } else {
      BigNumber *result = subtract_abs(b, a);
      if (result) {
        result->is_negative = b->is_negative;
      }
      return result;
    }
  }
}

BigNumber *subtract(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  BigNumber *neg_b = (BigNumber *)malloc(sizeof(BigNumber));
  if (!neg_b)
    return NULL;

  memcpy(neg_b, b, sizeof(BigNumber));
  neg_b->is_negative = !b->is_negative;

  BigNumber *result = add(a, neg_b);
  free(neg_b);
  return result;
}

BigNumber *multiply(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  if ((a->length == 1 && a->head->chunk == 0) ||
      (b->length == 1 && b->head->chunk == 0)) {
    return create_bignum_from_string("0");
  }

  BigNumber *result = create_bignum_from_string("0");
  if (!result)
    return NULL;

  int position = 0;
  DigitNode *node_b = b->head;

  while (node_b) {
    BigNumber *partial = (BigNumber *)calloc(1, sizeof(BigNumber));
    if (!partial) {
      free_bignum(result);
      return NULL;
    }

    DigitNode *node_a = a->head;
    long long carry = 0;

    while (node_a || carry) {
      long long product = carry;
      if (node_a) {
        product += (long long)node_a->chunk * node_b->chunk;
        node_a = node_a->next;
      }

      carry = product / BASE;
      int chunk = (int)(product % BASE);

      DigitNode *new_node = create_node(chunk);
      if (!new_node) {
        free_bignum(partial);
        free_bignum(result);
        return NULL;
      }

      if (partial->length == 0) {
        partial->head = new_node;
        partial->tail = new_node;
      } else {
        new_node->prev = partial->tail;
        partial->tail->next = new_node;
        partial->tail = new_node;
      }
      partial->length++;
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < position; i++) {
      DigitNode *zero_node = create_node(0);
      if (!zero_node) {
        free_bignum(partial);
        free_bignum(result);
        return NULL;
      }
      zero_node->next = partial->head;
      partial->head->prev = zero_node;
      partial->head = zero_node;
      partial->length++;
    }

    BigNumber *new_result = add(result, partial);
    free_bignum(result);
    free_bignum(partial);
    result = new_result;

    if (!result)
      return NULL;

    node_b = node_b->next;
    position++;
  }

  result->is_negative = a->is_negative != b->is_negative;
  return result;
}

bool is_number(const char *token) {
  if (!token || !*token)
    return false;

  int start = 0;
  if (token[0] == '-') {
    if (!token[1])
      return false;
    start = 1;
  }

  for (int i = start; token[i]; i++) {
    if (!isdigit(token[i]))
      return false;
  }

  return true;
}

bool is_operator(const char *token) {
  if (is_number(token)) {
    return false;
  }
  return token[0] == '+' || token[0] == '-' || token[0] == '*';
}

void print_bignum(BigNumber *num) {
  if (!num)
    return;

  if (num->is_negative && (num->length > 1 || num->head->chunk != 0)) {
    printf("-");
  }

  printf("%d", num->tail->chunk);

  DigitNode *current = num->tail->prev;
  while (current) {
    printf("%09d", current->chunk);
    current = current->prev;
  }
  printf("\n");
}

int main(void) {
  char *line = NULL;
  size_t buffer_size = 0;

  if (getline(&line, &buffer_size, stdin) == -1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Failed to read input\n");
    free(line);
    return 2;
  }

  size_t len = strlen(line);
  if (len > 0 && line[len - 1] == '\n') {
    line[len - 1] = '\0';
    len--;
  }

  if (len == 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Empty input\n");
    free(line);
    return 2;
  }

  NumberStack *stack = create_stack();
  if (!stack) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Memory allocation error\n");
    return 2;
  }

  char *token = strtok(line, " ");

  while (token != NULL) {
    if (is_number(token)) {
      BigNumber *num = create_bignum_from_string(token);
      if (!num) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Memory allocation error\n");
        free_stack(stack);
        return 2;
      }
      push(stack, num);
    } else if (is_operator(token)) {
      if (stack->size < 2) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Error: Insufficient operands for operator\n");
        free_stack(stack);
        return 1;
      }

      BigNumber *b = pop(stack);
      BigNumber *a = pop(stack);
      BigNumber *result = NULL;

      switch (token[0]) {
      case '+':
        result = add(a, b);
        break;
      case '-':
        result = subtract(a, b);
        break;
      case '*':
        result = multiply(a, b);
        break;
      }

      free_bignum(a);
      free_bignum(b);

      if (!result) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Memory allocation error\n");
        free_stack(stack);
        return 2;
      }

      push(stack, result);

    } else {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid character\n");
      free_stack(stack);
      return 1;
    }

    token = strtok(NULL, " ");
  }

  if (stack->size != 1) {
    if (stack->size == 0) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: No result\n");
    } else {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Operation symbol is missed\n");
    }
    free_stack(stack);
    return 1;
  }

  BigNumber *result = pop(stack);
  print_bignum(result);
  free_bignum(result);
  free_stack(stack);
  free(line);

  return 0;
}
#include <ctype.h>
#include <limits.h>
#include <stdbool.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <sys/types.h>

#define BASE 1000000000
#define BASE_DIGITS 9

typedef struct DigitNode {
  int chunk;
  struct DigitNode *next;
  struct DigitNode *prev;
} DigitNode;

typedef struct {
  DigitNode *head;
  DigitNode *tail;
  int length;
  bool is_negative;
} BigNumber;

typedef struct StackNode {
  BigNumber *number;
  struct StackNode *next;
} StackNode;

typedef struct {
  StackNode *top;
  int size;
} NumberStack;

DigitNode *create_node(int chunk) {
  if (chunk < 0 || chunk >= BASE) {
    return NULL;
  }

  DigitNode *node = (DigitNode *)malloc(sizeof(DigitNode));
  if (!node)
    return NULL;

  node->chunk = chunk;
  node->next = NULL;
  node->prev = NULL;
  return node;
}

void free_bignum(BigNumber *num) {
  if (!num)
    return;

  DigitNode *current = num->head;
  while (current) {
    DigitNode *next = current->next;
    free(current);
    current = next;
  }
  free(num);
}

BigNumber *create_bignum_from_string(const char *str) {
  BigNumber *num = (BigNumber *)calloc(1, sizeof(BigNumber));
  if (!num)
    return NULL;

  int start = 0;
  if (str[0] == '-') {
    num->is_negative = true;
    start = 1;
  }

  if (str[start] == '\0') {
    free(num);
    return NULL;
  }

  size_t raw_len = strlen(str);
  if (raw_len > (size_t)INT_MAX) {
    free(num);
    return NULL;
  }
  int len = (int)(raw_len);

  for (int i = len; i > start;) {
    int chunk_start = (i - BASE_DIGITS > start) ? i - BASE_DIGITS : start;
    int chunk_len = i - chunk_start;

    char chunk_str[BASE_DIGITS + 1] = {0};
    strncpy(chunk_str, str + chunk_start, chunk_len);
    chunk_str[chunk_len] = '\0';

    char *endptr;
    long val = strtol(chunk_str, &endptr, 10);

    if (endptr == chunk_str || *endptr != '\0' || val < 0 || val >= BASE) {
      free_bignum(num);
      return NULL;
    }
    int chunk = (int)val;

    DigitNode *node = create_node(chunk);
    if (!node) {
      free_bignum(num);
      return NULL;
    }

    if (num->length == 0) {
      num->head = node;
      num->tail = node;
    } else {
      node->prev = num->tail;
      num->tail->next = node;
      num->tail = node;
    }
    num->length++;

    i = chunk_start;
  }

  if (num->length == 0) {
    DigitNode *zero = create_node(0);
    num->head = zero;
    num->tail = zero;
    num->length = 1;
    num->is_negative = false;
  } else {
    while (num->length > 1 && num->tail->chunk == 0) {
      DigitNode *prev = num->tail->prev;
      free(num->tail);
      num->tail = prev;
      num->tail->next = NULL;
      num->length--;
    }
    if (num->length == 1 && num->head->chunk == 0) {
      num->is_negative = false;
    }
  }

  return num;
}

NumberStack *create_stack(void) {
  NumberStack *stack = (NumberStack *)malloc(sizeof(NumberStack));
  if (stack) {
    stack->top = NULL;
    stack->size = 0;
  }
  return stack;
}

void push(NumberStack *stack, BigNumber *num) {
  StackNode *node = (StackNode *)malloc(sizeof(StackNode));
  if (!node)
    return;

  node->number = num;
  node->next = stack->top;
  stack->top = node;
  stack->size++;
}

BigNumber *pop(NumberStack *stack) {
  if (!stack || !stack->top)
    return NULL;

  StackNode *node = stack->top;
  BigNumber *num = node->number;
  stack->top = node->next;
  free(node);
  stack->size--;
  return num;
}

void free_stack(NumberStack *stack) {
  while (stack->top) {
    StackNode *node = stack->top;
    stack->top = node->next;
    free_bignum(node->number);
    free(node);
  }
  free(stack);
}

int compare_abs(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  if (a->length != b->length) {
    return a->length > b->length ? 1 : -1;
  }

  DigitNode *node_a = a->tail;
  DigitNode *node_b = b->tail;

  while (node_a && node_b) {
    if (node_a->chunk != node_b->chunk) {
      return node_a->chunk > node_b->chunk ? 1 : -1;
    }
    node_a = node_a->prev;
    node_b = node_b->prev;
  }
  return 0;
}

BigNumber *add_abs(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  BigNumber *result = (BigNumber *)calloc(1, sizeof(BigNumber));
  if (!result)
    return NULL;

  DigitNode *node_a = a->head;
  DigitNode *node_b = b->head;
  int carry = 0;

  while (node_a || node_b || carry) {
    int sum = carry;
    if (node_a) {
      sum += node_a->chunk;
      node_a = node_a->next;
    }
    if (node_b) {
      sum += node_b->chunk;
      node_b = node_b->next;
    }

    carry = sum / BASE;
    int chunk = sum % BASE;

    DigitNode *new_node = create_node(chunk);
    if (!new_node) {
      free_bignum(result);
      return NULL;
    }

    if (result->length == 0) {
      result->head = new_node;
      result->tail = new_node;
    } else {
      new_node->prev = result->tail;
      result->tail->next = new_node;
      result->tail = new_node;
    }
    result->length++;
  }

  return result;
}

BigNumber *subtract_abs(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  BigNumber *result = (BigNumber *)calloc(1, sizeof(BigNumber));
  if (!result)
    return NULL;

  DigitNode *node_a = a->head;
  DigitNode *node_b = b->head;
  int borrow = 0;

  while (node_a || node_b) {
    int diff = (node_a ? node_a->chunk : 0) - borrow;
    if (node_b) {
      diff -= node_b->chunk;
    }

    if (diff < 0) {
      diff += BASE;
      borrow = 1;
    } else {
      borrow = 0;
    }

    DigitNode *new_node = create_node(diff);
    if (!new_node) {
      free_bignum(result);
      return NULL;
    }

    if (result->length == 0) {
      result->head = new_node;
      result->tail = new_node;
    } else {
      new_node->prev = result->tail;
      result->tail->next = new_node;
      result->tail = new_node;
    }
    result->length++;

    if (node_a)
      node_a = node_a->next;
    if (node_b)
      node_b = node_b->next;
  }

  while (result->tail != result->head && result->tail->chunk == 0) {
    DigitNode *prev = result->tail->prev;
    free(result->tail);
    result->tail = prev;
    result->tail->next = NULL;
    result->length--;
  }

  return result;
}

BigNumber *add(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  if (a->is_negative == b->is_negative) {
    BigNumber *result = add_abs(a, b);
    if (result) {
      result->is_negative = a->is_negative;
    }
    return result;
  } else {
    int cmp = compare_abs(a, b);
    if (cmp == 0) {
      return create_bignum_from_string("0");
    } else if (cmp > 0) {
      BigNumber *result = subtract_abs(a, b);
      if (result) {
        result->is_negative = a->is_negative;
      }
      return result;
    } else {
      BigNumber *result = subtract_abs(b, a);
      if (result) {
        result->is_negative = b->is_negative;
      }
      return result;
    }
  }
}

BigNumber *subtract(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  BigNumber *neg_b = (BigNumber *)malloc(sizeof(BigNumber));
  if (!neg_b)
    return NULL;

  memcpy(neg_b, b, sizeof(BigNumber));
  neg_b->is_negative = !b->is_negative;

  BigNumber *result = add(a, neg_b);
  free(neg_b);
  return result;
}

BigNumber *multiply(BigNumber *a, BigNumber *b) {
  if ((a->length == 1 && a->head->chunk == 0) ||
      (b->length == 1 && b->head->chunk == 0)) {
    return create_bignum_from_string("0");
  }

  BigNumber *result = create_bignum_from_string("0");
  if (!result)
    return NULL;

  int position = 0;
  DigitNode *node_b = b->head;

  while (node_b) {
    BigNumber *partial = (BigNumber *)calloc(1, sizeof(BigNumber));
    if (!partial) {
      free_bignum(result);
      return NULL;
    }

    DigitNode *node_a = a->head;
    long long carry = 0;

    while (node_a || carry) {
      long long product = carry;
      if (node_a) {
        product += (long long)node_a->chunk * node_b->chunk;
        node_a = node_a->next;
      }

      carry = product / BASE;
      int chunk = (int)(product % BASE);

      DigitNode *new_node = create_node(chunk);
      if (!new_node) {
        free_bignum(partial);
        free_bignum(result);
        return NULL;
      }

      if (partial->length == 0) {
        partial->head = new_node;
        partial->tail = new_node;
      } else {
        new_node->prev = partial->tail;
        partial->tail->next = new_node;
        partial->tail = new_node;
      }
      partial->length++;
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < position; i++) {
      DigitNode *zero_node = create_node(0);
      if (!zero_node) {
        free_bignum(partial);
        free_bignum(result);
        return NULL;
      }
      zero_node->next = partial->head;
      partial->head->prev = zero_node;
      partial->head = zero_node;
      partial->length++;
    }

    BigNumber *new_result = add(result, partial);
    free_bignum(result);
    free_bignum(partial);
    result = new_result;

    if (!result)
      return NULL;

    node_b = node_b->next;
    position++;
  }

  result->is_negative = a->is_negative != b->is_negative;
  return result;
}

bool is_number(const char *token) {
  if (!token || !*token)
    return false;

  int start = 0;
  if (token[0] == '-') {
    if (!token[1])
      return false;
    start = 1;
  }

  for (int i = start; token[i]; i++) {
    if (!isdigit(token[i]))
      return false;
  }

  return true;
}

bool is_operator(const char *token) {
  if (is_number(token)) {
    return false;
  }
  return token[0] == '+' || token[0] == '-' || token[0] == '*';
}

void print_bignum(BigNumber *num) {
  if (!num)
    return;

  if (num->is_negative && (num->length > 1 || num->head->chunk != 0)) {
    printf("-");
  }

  printf("%d", num->tail->chunk);

  DigitNode *current = num->tail->prev;
  while (current) {
    printf("%09d", current->chunk);
    current = current->prev;
  }
  printf("\n");
}

int main(void) {
  char *line = NULL;
  size_t buffer_size = 0;

  if (getline(&line, &buffer_size, stdin) == -1) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Failed to read input\n");
    free(line);
    return 2;
  }

  size_t len = strlen(line);
  if (len > 0 && line[len - 1] == '\n') {
    line[len - 1] = '\0';
    len--;
  }

  if (len == 0) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Error: Empty input\n");
    free(line);
    return 2;
  }

  NumberStack *stack = create_stack();
  if (!stack) {
    fprintf(stderr, "Memory allocation error\n");
    return 2;
  }

  char *token = strtok(line, " ");

  while (token != NULL) {
    if (is_number(token)) {
      BigNumber *num = create_bignum_from_string(token);
      if (!num) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Memory allocation error\n");
        free_stack(stack);
        return 2;
      }
      push(stack, num);
    } else if (is_operator(token)) {
      if (stack->size < 2) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Error: Insufficient operands for operator\n");
        free_stack(stack);
        return 1;
      }

      BigNumber *b = pop(stack);
      BigNumber *a = pop(stack);
      BigNumber *result = NULL;

      switch (token[0]) {
      case '+':
        result = add(a, b);
        break;
      case '-':
        result = subtract(a, b);
        break;
      case '*':
        result = multiply(a, b);
        break;
      }

      free_bignum(a);
      free_bignum(b);

      if (!result) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Memory allocation error\n");
        free_stack(stack);
        return 2;
      }

      push(stack, result);

    } else {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Invalid character\n");
      free_stack(stack);
      return 1;
    }

    token = strtok(NULL, " ");
  }

  if (stack->size != 1) {
    if (stack->size == 0) {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: No result\n");
    } else {
      fprintf(stderr, "Error: Operation symbol is missed\n");
    }
    free_stack(stack);
    return 1;
  }

  BigNumber *result = pop(stack);
  print_bignum(result);
  free_bignum(result);
  free_stack(stack);
  free(line);

  return 0;
}

class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
        enableEdgeToEdge()
        setContent {
            GreetingCardTheme {
                Scaffold(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) { innerPadding ->
                    Greeting(
                        name = "Android",
                        modifier = Modifier.padding(innerPadding)
                    )
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

@Composable
fun Greeting(name: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
    Surface(color = Color.Green) {
        Text(
            text = "Hi, my name is $name!",
            modifier = modifier.padding(24.dp)
        )
    }
}

fun GreetingPreview() {
    GreetingCardTheme {
        Greeting("Evi")
    }

import android.app.Activity
import android.os.Build
import androidx.compose.foundation.isSystemInDarkTheme
import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme

import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext

private val DarkColorScheme = darkColorScheme(
    primary = Purple80,
    secondary = PurpleGrey80,
    tertiary = Pink80
)

private val LightColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = Purple40,
    secondary = PurpleGrey40,
    tertiary = Pink40

    /* Other default colors to override
    background = Color(0xFFFFFBFE),
    surface = Color(0xFFFFFBFE),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    onTertiary = Color.White,
    onBackground = Color(0xFF1C1B1F),
    onSurface = Color(0xFF1C1B1F),
    */
)

@Composable
fun GreetingCardTheme(
    darkTheme: Boolean = isSystemInDarkTheme(),
    // Dynamic color is available on Android 12+
    dynamicColor: Boolean = true,
    content: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    val colorScheme = when {
        dynamicColor && Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.S -> {
            val context = LocalContext.current
            if (darkTheme) dynamicDarkColorScheme(context) else dynamicLightColorScheme(context)
        }

        darkTheme -> DarkColorScheme
        else -> LightColorScheme
    }

    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = colorScheme,
        typography = Typography,
        content = content
    )
}package com.example.greetingcard.ui.theme

        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 16.sp,
        lineHeight = 24.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
    /* Other default text styles to override
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 22.sp,
        lineHeight = 28.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.sp
    ),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,

        lineHeight = 16.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp

/* Version number components: V=Version, R=Revision, P=Patch
   Version date components:   YYYY=Year, MM=Month,   DD=Day  */

#if defined(__INTEL_COMPILER) || defined(__ICC)
# define COMPILER_ID "Intel"
# if defined(_MSC_VER)
#  define SIMULATE_ID "MSVC"
# endif
# if defined(__GNUC__)
#  define SIMULATE_ID "GNU"
# endif
  /* __INTEL_COMPILER = VRP prior to 2021, and then VVVV for 2021 and later,
     except that a few beta releases use the old format with V=2021.  */
# if __INTEL_COMPILER < 2021 || __INTEL_COMPILER == 202110 || __INTEL_COMPILER == 202111
#  define COMPILER_VERSION_MAJOR DEC(__INTEL_COMPILER/100)
#  define COMPILER_VERSION_MINOR DEC(__INTEL_COMPILER/10 % 10)
#  if defined(__INTEL_COMPILER_UPDATE)
#   define COMPILER_VERSION_PATCH DEC(__INTEL_COMPILER_UPDATE)
#  else
#   define COMPILER_VERSION_PATCH DEC(__INTEL_COMPILER   % 10)
#  endif
# else
#  define COMPILER_VERSION_MAJOR DEC(__INTEL_COMPILER)
#  define COMPILER_VERSION_MINOR DEC(__INTEL_COMPILER_UPDATE)
   /* The third version component from --version is an update index,
      but no macro is provided for it.  */
#  define COMPILER_VERSION_PATCH DEC(0)
# endif
# if defined(__INTEL_COMPILER_BUILD_DATE)
   /* __INTEL_COMPILER_BUILD_DATE = YYYYMMDD */
#  define COMPILER_VERSION_TWEAK DEC(__INTEL_COMPILER_BUILD_DATE)
# endif
# if defined(_MSC_VER)
   /* _MSC_VER = VVRR */
#  define SIMULATE_VERSION_MAJOR DEC(_MSC_VER / 100)
#  define SIMULATE_VERSION_MINOR DEC(_MSC_VER % 100)
# endif
# if defined(__GNUC__)
#  define SIMULATE_VERSION_MAJOR DEC(__GNUC__)
# elif defined(__GNUG__)
#  define SIMULATE_VERSION_MAJOR DEC(__GNUG__)
# endif
# if defined(__GNUC_MINOR__)
#  define SIMULATE_VERSION_MINOR DEC(__GNUC_MINOR__)
# endif
# if defined(__GNUC_PATCHLEVEL__)
#  define SIMULATE_VERSION_PATCH DEC(__GNUC_PATCHLEVEL__)
# endif

#elif (defined(__clang__) && defined(__INTEL_CLANG_COMPILER)) || defined(__INTEL_LLVM_COMPILER)

 * later.  Look for 6 digit vs. 8 digit version number to decide encoding.
 * VVVV is no smaller than the current year when a version is released.

# define COMPILER_VERSION_MINOR DEC(__INTEL_LLVM_COMPILER/100 % 100)
# define COMPILER_VERSION_PATCH DEC(__INTEL_LLVM_COMPILER     % 100)
#endif
#if defined(_MSC_VER)
  /* _MSC_VER = VVRR */

# define SIMULATE_VERSION_MINOR DEC(_MSC_VER % 100)
#endif
#if defined(__GNUC__)

#elif defined(__GNUG__)
