static void sadism7(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0}; // "read_test"
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b11111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b11111011;
        buffer_getc[4] = 0b11110010;
        buffer_getc[5] = 0b10101011;
        buffer_getc[6] = 0b11110111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 7;
    const uint8_t expected1[] = { // "read_test"
};
    const uint8_t expected2[] = { // "read_test"
        0b01010101,
};
    int message_len1 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len1, 0);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected1, message_len1);
    int message_len2 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len2, 1);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected2, message_len2);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void sadism8(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0}; // "read_test"
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b11111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b10111011;
        buffer_getc[4] = 0b11110010;
        buffer_getc[5] = 0b10101011;
        buffer_getc[6] = 0b11110111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 7;
    const uint8_t expected1[] = { // "read_test"
};
    const uint8_t expected2[] = { // "read_test"
        0b01010101,
};
    int message_len1 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len1, 0);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected1, message_len1);
    int message_len2 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len2, EOF);
}

static void sadism9(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0}; // "read_test"
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b11111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b10111011;
        buffer_getc[4] = 0b11110010;
        buffer_getc[5] = 0b10101011;
        buffer_getc[6] = 0b11110111;
        buffer_getc[7] = 0b11101111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 8;
    const uint8_t expected1[] = { // "read_test"
};
    const uint8_t expected2[] = { // "read_test"
        0b01010101,
};
;
    int message_len1 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len1, 0);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected1, message_len1);
    int message_len2 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len2, EOF);
}

static void sadism10(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0}; // "read_test"
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b10111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b00011111;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01011111;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b10111111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 4;
    const uint8_t expected[] = { // "read_test"
        0b00111111,
};  

    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 1);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected, message_len);
}

static void sadism11(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[] = { // "write_message"
            0b11111111,
            0b00011110,
            0b01111100,
            0b10011111,
            0b11111001,
            0b01111000,
    };
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    const uint8_t expected_msb[] = {
        0b01111110,
        0b11111011,
        0b10001111,
        0b00111110,
        0b00100111,
        0b11011111,
        0b00010111,
        0b10000111,
        0b11101111,
    };

    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(buffer_putc_len, 9);
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        assert_memory_equal(buffer_putc, expected_msb, buffer_putc_len);
    }
    // Check error string
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

int main() {
    const struct CMUnitTest tests[] = {
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_with_prefix_bits_1, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_read_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_read_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism1, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism2, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism3, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism4, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism5, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism6, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism7, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism8, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism9, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism10, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism11, test_setup),
    };

    return cmocka_run_group_tests(tests, test_group_setup, test_group_teardown);
}
#include "protocol.h"

#include <stdarg.h>
#include <stddef.h>
#include <setjmp.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <memory.h>
#include <inttypes.h>
#include <strings.h>

#include <cmocka.h>

#if defined(getc) || defined(putc) || defined(fprintf)
#error "Not handled yet: redefinition of stdio functions"
#endif

#define TEST_BUFFER_SIZE 512
static char buffer_stderr[TEST_BUFFER_SIZE];
static volatile size_t buffer_putc_len;
static uint8_t buffer_putc[TEST_BUFFER_SIZE];
static size_t buffer_getc_len;
static size_t buffer_getc_index;
static uint8_t buffer_getc[TEST_BUFFER_SIZE];

static FILE *message_stream;

static enum {
    UNDEFINED,
    MSB_FIRST,
    LSB_FIRST,
} mode = UNDEFINED;

/**
 * A mock getc function that get character from buffer
 * @param[in] stream
 * @return reads the next character from buffer and returns it
 * as an unsigned char cast to an int, or EOF when nothing is left
 * in the buffer
 */
int __wrap_getc(FILE *stream) {
    assert_true(stream == message_stream);
    return buffer_getc_index == buffer_getc_len
           ? EOF
           : buffer_getc[buffer_getc_index++];
}

/**
 * A mock putc function that put character to buffer
 * @param[in] c
 * @param[in] stream
 * @return the character written as an unsigned char cast to an int or EOF when buffer is full
 */
int __wrap_putc(int c, FILE *stream) {
    assert_true(stream == message_stream);
    if (buffer_putc_len == TEST_BUFFER_SIZE) {
        return EOF;
    }
    buffer_putc[buffer_putc_len++] = (uint8_t) c;
    return c;
}

/**
 * A mock fprintf function that checks the value of strings printed to the
 * standard error stream or output stream.
 */
int __wrap_fprintf(FILE *file, const char *format, ...) {
    int return_value;
    va_list args;
    assert_true(file == stderr);
    va_start(args, format);
    return_value = vsnprintf(buffer_stderr, sizeof(buffer_stderr),
                             format, args);
    va_end(args);
    return return_value;
}

/*
 * Wrap for exit(int) function
 **/
void __wrap_exit(int status) {
    (void)status;
    return;
}

/**
 * Create test stream with tmpfile()
 *
 * Run once before tests.
 * @param state unused (required by cmocka API)
 */
static int test_group_setup(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    message_stream = tmpfile();
    bzero(buffer_putc, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    buffer_putc_len = 0u;
    uint8_t message[] = { // "write_message"
            0x80, // 10000000
    };
    write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    if (buffer_putc_len != 3
        || buffer_putc[0] != 0x7E
        || buffer_putc[2] != 0x7E) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (buffer_putc[1] == 0x80) { // 10000000
        mode = MSB_FIRST;
        return 0;
    }
    if (buffer_putc[1] == 0x01) { // 00000001
        mode = LSB_FIRST;
        return 0;
    }
    return 1;
}

/**
 * Close test stream.
 * Run once after tests.
 * @param state unused (required by cmocka API)
 */
static int test_group_teardown(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    fclose(message_stream);
    return 0;
}

/**
 * Free buffers needed by tests.
 * Run before each test.
 * @param state unused (required by cmocka API)
 */
static int test_setup(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    bzero(buffer_stderr, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    bzero(buffer_putc, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    buffer_putc_len = 0u;
    bzero(buffer_getc, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    buffer_getc_len = 0u;
    buffer_getc_index = 0u;
    return 0;
}

static void example_test_write_empty_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[1] = {0};
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, 0);

    const uint8_t expected[] = {
            0x7E,
            0x7E,
    };
    // Check buffer
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 0);
    assert_int_equal(buffer_putc_len, 2);
    assert_memory_equal(buffer_putc, expected, 2);
    // Check error string
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_write_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[] = { // "write_message"
            0x77, // 01110111
            0x72, // 01110010
            0x69, // 01101001
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x5F, // 01011111
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x73, // 01110011
            0x74, // 01110100
    };
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    const uint8_t expected_msb[] = {
            0x7E, // 01111110
            0x77, // 01110111
            0x72, // 01110010
            0x69, // 01101001
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x5F, // 01011111
            0x3A, // 00111010
            0x32, // 00110010
            0xB9, // 10111001
            0xBA, // 10111010
            0x3F, // 00111111
            0x7F, // 01111111
    };
    const uint8_t expected_lsb[] = {
            0x7E, // 01111110
            0xEE, // 11101110
            0x4E, // 01001110
            0x96, // 10010110
            0x2E, // 00101110
            0xA6, // 10100110
            0xFA, // 11111010
            0x5C, // 01011100
            0x4C, // 01001100
            0x9D, // 10011101
            0x5D, // 01011101
            0xFC, // 11111100
            0xFE, // 11111110
    };
    // Check buffer
    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(buffer_putc_len, 13);
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        assert_memory_equal(buffer_putc, expected_msb, buffer_putc_len);
    } else {
        assert_memory_equal(buffer_putc, expected_lsb, buffer_putc_len);
    }
    // Check error string
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_read_empty_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E;
    buffer_getc[1] = 0x7E;
    buffer_getc_len = 2;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 0);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_read_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0}; // "read_test"
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // 01111110
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x72; // 01110010
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x65; // 01100101
        buffer_getc[3] = 0x61; // 01100001
        buffer_getc[4] = 0x64; // 01100100
        buffer_getc[5] = 0x5F; // 01011111
        buffer_getc[6] = 0x3A; // 00111010
        buffer_getc[7] = 0x32; // 00110010
        buffer_getc[8] = 0xB9; // 10111001
        buffer_getc[9] = 0xBA; // 10111010
        buffer_getc[10] = 0x3F; // 00111111
        buffer_getc[11] = 0x7F; // 01111111
    } else {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // 01111110
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x4E; // 01001110
        buffer_getc[2] = 0xA6; // 10100110
        buffer_getc[3] = 0x86; // 10000110
        buffer_getc[4] = 0x26; // 00100110
        buffer_getc[5] = 0xFA; // 11111010
        buffer_getc[6] = 0x5C; // 01011100
        buffer_getc[7] = 0x4C; // 01001100
        buffer_getc[8] = 0x9D; // 10011101
        buffer_getc[9] = 0x5D; // 01011101
        buffer_getc[10] = 0xFC; // 11111100
        buffer_getc[11] = 0xFE; // 11111110
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 12;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    const uint8_t expected[] = { // "read_test"
            0x72, // 01110010
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x61, // 01100001
            0x64, // 01100100
            0x5F, // 01011111
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x73, // 01110011
            0x74, // 01110100
    };
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 9);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected, message_len);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_read_with_prefix_bits_1(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0}; // "read_test"
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0xBF; // 10111111
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x39; // 00111001
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x32; // 00110010
        buffer_getc[3] = 0xB0; // 10110000
        buffer_getc[4] = 0xB2; // 10110010
        buffer_getc[5] = 0x2F; // 00101111
        buffer_getc[6] = 0x9D; // 10011101
        buffer_getc[7] = 0x19; // 00011001
        buffer_getc[8] = 0x5C; // 01011100
        buffer_getc[9] = 0xDD; // 11011101
        buffer_getc[10] = 0x1F; // 00011111
        buffer_getc[11] = 0xBF; // 10111111
    } else {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0xFD; // 11111101
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x9C; // 10011100
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x4C; // 01001100
        buffer_getc[3] = 0x0D; // 00001101
        buffer_getc[4] = 0x4D; // 01001101
        buffer_getc[5] = 0xF4; // 11110100
        buffer_getc[6] = 0xB9; // 10111001
        buffer_getc[7] = 0x98; // 10011000
        buffer_getc[8] = 0x3A; // 00111010
        buffer_getc[9] = 0xBB; // 10111011
        buffer_getc[10] = 0xF8; // 11111000
        buffer_getc[11] = 0xFD; // 11111101
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 12;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    const uint8_t expected[] = { // "read_test"
            0x72, // 01110010
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x61, // 01100001
            0x64, // 01100100
            0x5F, // 01011111
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x73, // 01110011
            0x74, // 01110100
    };
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 9);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected, message_len);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_write_read_empty_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const char *message_written = "";
    size_t len = strlen(message_written);
    write_message(message_stream, message_written, len);
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    char message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    read_message(message_stream, message_read);

    assert_int_equal(strlen(message_read), len);
    assert_string_equal(message_read, message_written);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_write_read_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const char *message_written = "write_read_test";
    size_t len = strlen(message_written);
    int message_written_len = write_message(message_stream, message_written, len);
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    char message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int message_read_len = read_message(message_stream, message_read);

    assert_int_equal(message_written_len, len);
    assert_int_equal(message_read_len, len);
    assert_int_equal(strlen(message_read), len);
    assert_string_equal(message_read, message_written);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

// ========== ДОПОЛНИТЕЛЬНЫЕ ТЕСТЫ ==========

// Тест на передачу сообщения с множественными последовательностями из 5 единиц
static void test_multiple_five_ones_sequences(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[] = {
        0xFF, // 11111111 - будет два stuffing
        0xF8, // 11111000 - будет один stuffing
        0x1F, // 00011111 - будет один stuffing
    };
    
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    
    // Проверяем что запись прошла успешно
    assert_true(buffer_putc_len > 0);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
    
    // Проверяем чтение обратно
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    uint8_t message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int read_len = read_message(message_stream, message_read);
    
    assert_int_equal(read_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_memory_equal(message_read, message, sizeof(message));
}

// Тест на передачу сообщения с байтом 0x7E внутри данных (должен быть обработан корректно)
static void test_7e_inside_data(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[] = {
        0x12, 0x34, 0x56, 0x7E, 0x78, 0x9A, 0xBC, 0xDE
    };
    
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    
    // Проверяем что в закодированных данных нет маркера 0x7E кроме границ
    
    // Проверяем чтение обратно
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    uint8_t message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int read_len = read_message(message_stream, message_read);
    
    assert_int_equal(read_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_memory_equal(message_read, message, sizeof(message));
}

// Тест на передачу максимально возможного сообщения
static void test_max_length_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN];
    
    // Заполняем тестовыми данными
    for (size_t i = 0; i < MAX_MESSAGE_LEN; i++) {
        message[i] = (uint8_t)(i % 256);
    }
    
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, MAX_MESSAGE_LEN);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, MAX_MESSAGE_LEN);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
    
    // Проверяем чтение обратно
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    uint8_t message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int read_len = read_message(message_stream, message_read);
    
    assert_int_equal(read_len, MAX_MESSAGE_LEN);
    assert_memory_equal(message_read, message, MAX_MESSAGE_LEN);
}

// Тест на обработку ошибки при неверном формате (отсутствует конечный маркер)
static void test_missing_end_marker(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // стартовый маркер
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x12; // данные
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x34; // данные
        // конечный маркер отсутствует
    } else {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // стартовый маркер
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x48; // данные
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x2C; // данные
        // конечный маркер отсутствует
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 3;
    
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    
    assert_int_equal(message_len, -1);
    // Должна быть ошибка в stderr
}

// Тест на обработку ошибки при неверном stuffing
static void test_invalid_stuffing(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        // 5 единиц подряд, но следующий бит не 0 (нарушение правила stuffing)
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // стартовый маркер
        buffer_getc[1] = 0xF8; // 11111000 - здесь должен быть stuffing после 5 единиц
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x7E; // конечный маркер
    } else {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // стартовый маркер
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x1F; // 00011111 - здесь должен быть stuffing после 5 единиц
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x7E; // конечный маркер
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 3;
    
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    
    assert_int_equal(message_len, -1);
}

// Тест на передачу сообщения с последовательностью битов, требующей много stuffing
static void test_heavy_stuffing(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[] = {
        0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF  // Много последовательных единиц
    };
    
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
    
    // Проверяем что размер закодированных данных увеличился из-за stuffing
    assert_true(buffer_putc_len > (sizeof(message) + 2));
    
    // Проверяем чтение обратно
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    uint8_t message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int read_len = read_message(message_stream, message_read);
    
    assert_int_equal(read_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_memory_equal(message_read, message, sizeof(message));
}

// Тест на обработку EOF при чтении
static void test_eof_while_reading(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // стартовый маркер
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x12; // данные
        // EOF до конечного маркера
    } else {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // стартовый маркер
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x48; // данные
        // EOF до конечного маркера
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 2; // Не хватает данных
    
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    
    assert_int_equal(message_len, -1);
}

// Тест на передачу одного байта
static void test_single_byte(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[] = {0x55}; // 01010101
    
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
    
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    uint8_t message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    int read_len = read_message(message_stream, message_read);
    
    assert_int_equal(read_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_memory_equal(message_read, message, sizeof(message));
}

// Тест на передачу всех возможных байтов
static void test_all_bytes(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[256];
    for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
        message[i] = (uint8_t)i;
    }
    
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
    
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    uint8_t message_read[256] = {0};
    int read_len = read_message(message_stream, message_read);
    
    assert_int_equal(read_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_memory_equal(message_read, message, sizeof(message));
}

// ========== СУЩЕСТВУЮЩИЕ SADISM ТЕСТЫ ==========

static void sadism1(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b11100111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b11100111;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b11101111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 3;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, -1);
}

static void sadism2(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b11111101;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b11111011;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 3;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, -1);
}

static void sadism3(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b11111110;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b11111101;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 3;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, -1);
}

static void sadism4(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b11111100;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b11111001;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111110;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 3;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, -1);
}

static void sadism5(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b11011001;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 3;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, -1);
}

static void sadism6(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b10111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b01111101;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111100;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b10001110;
        buffer_getc[4] = 0b00011111;
        buffer_getc[5] = 0b01010111;
        buffer_getc[6] = 0b11101111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 7;
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    const uint8_t expected[] = {
        0b11111101,
        0b11110100,
        0b01110000,
        0b11111101,
    };
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 4);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected, message_len);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void sadism7(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b11111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b11111011;
        buffer_getc[4] = 0b11110010;
        buffer_getc[5] = 0b10101011;
        buffer_getc[6] = 0b11110111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 7;
    const uint8_t expected1[] = {};
    const uint8_t expected2[] = {0b01010101};
    int message_len1 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len1, 0);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected1, message_len1);
    int message_len2 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len2, 1);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected2, message_len2);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void sadism8(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b11111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b10111011;
        buffer_getc[4] = 0b11110010;
        buffer_getc[5] = 0b10101011;
        buffer_getc[6] = 0b11110111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 7;
    const uint8_t expected1[] = {};
    int message_len1 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len1, 0);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected1, message_len1);
    int message_len2 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len2, -1);
}

static void sadism9(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b11111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01111110;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b10111011;
        buffer_getc[4] = 0b11110010;
        buffer_getc[5] = 0b10101011;
        buffer_getc[6] = 0b11110111;
        buffer_getc[7] = 0b11101111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 8;
    const uint8_t expected1[] = {};
    int message_len1 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len1, 0);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected1, message_len1);
    int message_len2 = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len2, -1);
}

static void sadism10(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0b10111111;
        buffer_getc[1] = 0b00011111;
        buffer_getc[2] = 0b01011111;
        buffer_getc[3] = 0b10111111;
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 4;
    const uint8_t expected[] = {0b00111111};
    int message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 1);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected, message_len);
}

static void sadism11(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[] = {
        0b11111111,
        0b00011110,
        0b01111100,
        0b10011111,
        0b11111001,
        0b01111000,
    };
    int message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    const uint8_t expected_msb[] = {
        0b01111110,
        0b11111011,
        0b10001111,
        0b00111110,
        0b00100111,
        0b11011111,
        0b00010111,
        0b10000111,
        0b11101111,
    };
    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(buffer_putc_len, 9);
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        assert_memory_equal(buffer_putc, expected_msb, buffer_putc_len);
    }
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

int main() {
    const struct CMUnitTest tests[] = {
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_with_prefix_bits_1, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_read_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_read_message, test_setup),
            
            // Новые тесты
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_multiple_five_ones_sequences, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_7e_inside_data, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_max_length_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_missing_end_marker, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_invalid_stuffing, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_heavy_stuffing, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_eof_while_reading, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_single_byte, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(test_all_bytes, test_setup),
            
            // Существующие sadism тесты
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism1, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism2, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism3, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism4, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism5, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism6, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism7, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism8, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism9, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism10, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(sadism11, test_setup),
    };

    return cmocka_run_group_tests(tests, test_group_setup, test_group_teardown);
}
#include "protocol.h"

#include <stdarg.h>
#include <stddef.h>
#include <setjmp.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <memory.h>
#include <inttypes.h>
#include <sys/types.h>
#include <strings.h>

#include <cmocka.h>

#if defined(getc) || defined(putc) || defined(fprintf)
#error "Not handled yet: redefinition of stdio functions"
#endif

#define TEST_BUFFER_SIZE 512
static char buffer_stderr[TEST_BUFFER_SIZE];
static volatile size_t buffer_putc_len;
static uint8_t buffer_putc[TEST_BUFFER_SIZE];
static size_t buffer_getc_len;
static size_t buffer_getc_index;
static uint8_t buffer_getc[TEST_BUFFER_SIZE];

static FILE *message_stream;

static enum {
    UNDEFINED,
    MSB_FIRST,
    LSB_FIRST,
} mode = UNDEFINED;

/**
 * A mock getc function that get character from buffer
 * @param[in] stream
 * @return reads the next character from buffer and returns it
 * as an unsigned char cast to an int, or EOF when nothing is left
 * in the buffer
 */
int __wrap_getc(FILE *stream) {
    assert_true(stream == message_stream);
    return buffer_getc_index == buffer_getc_len
           ? EOF
           : buffer_getc[buffer_getc_index++];
}

/**
 * A mock putc function that put character to buffer
 * @param[in] c
 * @param[in] stream
 * @return the character written as an unsigned char cast to an int or EOF when buffer is full
 */
int __wrap_putc(int c, FILE *stream) {
    assert_true(stream == message_stream);
    if (buffer_putc_len == TEST_BUFFER_SIZE) {
        return EOF;
    }
    buffer_putc[buffer_putc_len++] = (uint8_t) c;
    return c;
}

/**
 * A mock fprintf function that checks the value of strings printed to the
 * standard error stream or output stream.
 */
int __wrap_fprintf(FILE *file, const char *format, ...) {
    int return_value;
    va_list args;
    assert_true(file == stderr);
    va_start(args, format);
    return_value = vsnprintf(buffer_stderr, sizeof(buffer_stderr),
                             format, args);
    va_end(args);
    return return_value;
}

/*
 * Wrap for exit(int) function
 **/
void __wrap_exit(int status) {
    (void)status;
    return;
}

/**
 * Create test stream with tmpfile()
 *
 * Run once before tests.
 * @param state unused (required by cmocka API)
 */
/*static int test_group_setup(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    message_stream = tmpfile();
    bzero(buffer_putc, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    buffer_putc_len = 0u;
    uint8_t message[] = { // "write_message"
            0x80, // 10000000
    };
    write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    if (buffer_putc_len != 3
        || buffer_putc[0] != 0x7E
        || buffer_putc[2] != 0x7E) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (buffer_putc[1] == 0x80) { // 10000000
        mode = MSB_FIRST;
        return 0;
    }
    if (buffer_putc[1] == 0x01) { // 00000001
        mode = LSB_FIRST;
        return 0;
    }
    return 1;
}*/
static int test_group_setup(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    message_stream = tmpfile();
    bzero(buffer_putc, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    buffer_putc_len = 0u;
    uint8_t message[] = { // "write_message"
            0x80, // 10000000
    };
    
    // Debug info to stderr buffer
    snprintf(buffer_stderr, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE, "Setup: buffer_putc_len before: %zu\n", buffer_putc_len);
    
    ssize_t result = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    
    // Append more debug info
    int len = strlen(buffer_stderr);
    snprintf(buffer_stderr + len, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - len, 
             "Setup: write_message returned: %zd\n", result);
    snprintf(buffer_stderr + strlen(buffer_stderr), TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - strlen(buffer_stderr),
             "Setup: buffer_putc_len after: %zu\n", buffer_putc_len);
    if (buffer_putc_len >= 3) {
        snprintf(buffer_stderr + strlen(buffer_stderr), TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - strlen(buffer_stderr),
                 "Setup: bytes are: 0x%02X 0x%02X 0x%02X\n", 
                 buffer_putc[0], buffer_putc[1], buffer_putc[2]);
    }
    
    if (buffer_putc_len != 3) {
        snprintf(buffer_stderr + strlen(buffer_stderr), TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - strlen(buffer_stderr),
                 "Setup: FAIL - expected len 3, got %zu\n", buffer_putc_len);
        return 1;
    }
    if (buffer_putc[0] != 0x7E) {
        snprintf(buffer_stderr + strlen(buffer_stderr), TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - strlen(buffer_stderr),
                 "Setup: FAIL - expected 0x7E at [0], got 0x%02X\n", buffer_putc[0]);
        return 1;
    }
    if (buffer_putc[2] != 0x7E) {
        snprintf(buffer_stderr + strlen(buffer_stderr), TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - strlen(buffer_stderr),
                 "Setup: FAIL - expected 0x7E at [2], got 0x%02X\n", buffer_putc[2]);
        return 1;
    }
    
    if (buffer_putc[1] == 0x80) { // 10000000
        snprintf(buffer_stderr + strlen(buffer_stderr), TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - strlen(buffer_stderr),
                 "Setup: Detected MSB_FIRST mode\n");
        mode = MSB_FIRST;
        return 0;
    }
    if (buffer_putc[1] == 0x01) { // 00000001
        snprintf(buffer_stderr + strlen(buffer_stderr), TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - strlen(buffer_stderr),
                 "Setup: Detected LSB_FIRST mode\n");
        mode = LSB_FIRST;
        return 0;
    }
    
    snprintf(buffer_stderr + strlen(buffer_stderr), TEST_BUFFER_SIZE - strlen(buffer_stderr),
             "Setup: FAIL - expected 0x80 or 0x01 at [1], got 0x%02X\n", buffer_putc[1]);
    return 1;
}

/**
 * Close test stream.
 * Run once after tests.
 * @param state unused (required by cmocka API)
 */
static int test_group_teardown(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    fclose(message_stream);
    return 0;
}

/**
 * Free buffers needed by tests.
 * Run before each test.
 * @param state unused (required by cmocka API)
 */
static int test_setup(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    bzero(buffer_stderr, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    bzero(buffer_putc, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    buffer_putc_len = 0u;
    bzero(buffer_getc, TEST_BUFFER_SIZE);
    buffer_getc_len = 0u;
    buffer_getc_index = 0u;
    return 0;
}

static void example_test_write_empty_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[1] = {0};
    ssize_t message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, 0);

    const uint8_t expected[] = {
            0x7E,
            0x7E,
    };
    // Check buffer
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 0);
    assert_int_equal(buffer_putc_len, 2);
    assert_memory_equal(buffer_putc, expected, 2);
    // Check error string
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_write_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const uint8_t message[] = { // "write_message"
            0x77, // 01110111
            0x72, // 01110010
            0x69, // 01101001
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x5F, // 01011111
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x73, // 01110011
            0x74, // 01110100
    };
    ssize_t message_len = write_message(message_stream, message, sizeof(message));
    const uint8_t expected_msb[] = {
            0x7E, // 01111110
            0x77, // 01110111
            0x72, // 01110010
            0x69, // 01101001
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x5F, // 01011111
            0x3A, // 00111010
            0x32, // 00110010
            0xB9, // 10111001
            0xBA, // 10111010
            0x3F, // 00111111
            0x7F, // 01111111
    };
    const uint8_t expected_lsb[] = {
            0x7E, // 01111110
            0xEE, // 11101110
            0x4E, // 01001110
            0x96, // 10010110
            0x2E, // 00101110
            0xA6, // 10100110
            0xFA, // 11111010
            0x5C, // 01011100
            0x4C, // 01001100
            0x9D, // 10011101
            0x5D, // 01011101
            0xFC, // 11111100
            0xFE, // 11111110
    };
    // Check buffer
    assert_int_equal(message_len, sizeof(message));
    assert_int_equal(buffer_putc_len, 13);
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        assert_memory_equal(buffer_putc, expected_msb, buffer_putc_len);
    } else {
        assert_memory_equal(buffer_putc, expected_lsb, buffer_putc_len);
    }
    // Check error string
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_read_empty_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E;
    buffer_getc[1] = 0x7E;
    buffer_getc_len = 2;
    ssize_t message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 0);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_read_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0}; // "read_test"
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // 01111110
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x72; // 01110010
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x65; // 01100101
        buffer_getc[3] = 0x61; // 01100001
        buffer_getc[4] = 0x64; // 01100100
        buffer_getc[5] = 0x5F; // 01011111
        buffer_getc[6] = 0x3A; // 00111010
        buffer_getc[7] = 0x32; // 00110010
        buffer_getc[8] = 0xB9; // 10111001
        buffer_getc[9] = 0xBA; // 10111010
        buffer_getc[10] = 0x3F; // 00111111
        buffer_getc[11] = 0x7F; // 01111111
    } else {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0x7E; // 01111110
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x4E; // 01001110
        buffer_getc[2] = 0xA6; // 10100110
        buffer_getc[3] = 0x86; // 10000110
        buffer_getc[4] = 0x26; // 00100110
        buffer_getc[5] = 0xFA; // 11111010
        buffer_getc[6] = 0x5C; // 01011100
        buffer_getc[7] = 0x4C; // 01001100
        buffer_getc[8] = 0x9D; // 10011101
        buffer_getc[9] = 0x5D; // 01011101
        buffer_getc[10] = 0xFC; // 11111100
        buffer_getc[11] = 0xFE; // 11111110
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 12;
    ssize_t message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    const uint8_t expected[] = { // "read_test"
            0x72, // 01110010
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x61, // 01100001
            0x64, // 01100100
            0x5F, // 01011111
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x73, // 01110011
            0x74, // 01110100
    };
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 9);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected, message_len);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_read_with_prefix_bits_1(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    uint8_t message[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0}; // "read_test"
    if (mode == MSB_FIRST) {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0xBF; // 10111111
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x39; // 00111001
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x32; // 00110010
        buffer_getc[3] = 0xB0; // 10110000
        buffer_getc[4] = 0xB2; // 10110010
        buffer_getc[5] = 0x2F; // 00101111
        buffer_getc[6] = 0x9D; // 10011101
        buffer_getc[7] = 0x19; // 00011001
        buffer_getc[8] = 0x5C; // 01011100
        buffer_getc[9] = 0xDD; // 11011101
        buffer_getc[10] = 0x1F; // 00011111
        buffer_getc[11] = 0xBF; // 10111111
    } else {
        buffer_getc[0] = 0xFD; // 11111101
        buffer_getc[1] = 0x9C; // 10011100
        buffer_getc[2] = 0x4C; // 01001100
        buffer_getc[3] = 0x0D; // 00001101
        buffer_getc[4] = 0x4D; // 01001101
        buffer_getc[5] = 0xF4; // 11110100
        buffer_getc[6] = 0xB9; // 10111001
        buffer_getc[7] = 0x98; // 10011000
        buffer_getc[8] = 0x3A; // 00111010
        buffer_getc[9] = 0xBB; // 10111011
        buffer_getc[10] = 0xF8; // 11111000
        buffer_getc[11] = 0xFD; // 11111101
    }
    buffer_getc_len = 12;
    ssize_t message_len = read_message(message_stream, message);
    const uint8_t expected[] = { // "read_test"
            0x72, // 01110010
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x61, // 01100001
            0x64, // 01100100
            0x5F, // 01011111
            0x74, // 01110100
            0x65, // 01100101
            0x73, // 01110011
            0x74, // 01110100
    };
    assert_int_equal(message_len, 9);
    assert_memory_equal(message, expected, message_len);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_write_read_empty_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const char *message_written = "";
    size_t len = strlen(message_written);
    write_message(message_stream, message_written, len);
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    char message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    read_message(message_stream, message_read);

    assert_int_equal(strlen(message_read), len);
    assert_string_equal(message_read, message_written);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

static void example_test_write_read_message(void **state) {
    (void) state;
    const char *message_written = "write_read_test";
    size_t len = strlen(message_written);
    ssize_t message_written_len = write_message(message_stream, message_written, len);
    memcpy(buffer_getc, buffer_putc, buffer_putc_len);
    buffer_getc_len = buffer_putc_len;
    char message_read[MAX_MESSAGE_LEN] = {0};
    ssize_t message_read_len = read_message(message_stream, message_read);

    assert_int_equal(message_written_len, len);
    assert_int_equal(message_read_len, len);
    assert_int_equal(strlen(message_read), len);
    assert_string_equal(message_read, message_written);
    assert_string_equal(buffer_stderr, "");
}

int main() {
    const struct CMUnitTest tests[] = {
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_read_with_prefix_bits_1, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_read_empty_message, test_setup),
            cmocka_unit_test_setup(example_test_write_read_message, test_setup),
    };

    return cmocka_run_group_tests(tests, test_group_setup, test_group_teardown);
}
#include "protocol.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <stdint.h>

// Mock функции как в test_main.c
static uint8_t buffer_putc[512];
static size_t buffer_putc_len = 0;

int __wrap_putc(int c, FILE* stream) {
    if (buffer_putc_len < 512) {
        buffer_putc[buffer_putc_len++] = (uint8_t)c;
        return c;
    }
    return EOF;
}

int main() {
    printf("=== Testing GROUP SETUP logic ===\n");
    
    uint8_t message[] = {0x80}; // 10000000
    
    // Имитируем вызов из GROUP SETUP
    ssize_t result = write_message(NULL, message, 1);
    
    printf("write_message returned: %zd\n", result);
    printf("Buffer contains %zu bytes: ", buffer_putc_len);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < buffer_putc_len; i++) {
        printf("0x%02X ", buffer_putc[i]);
    }
    printf("\n");
    
    // Проверяем что ожидает GROUP SETUP
    if (buffer_putc_len == 3 && 
        buffer_putc[0] == 0x7E && 
        buffer_putc[2] == 0x7E) {
        printf("✓ Format is correct\n");
        
        if (buffer_putc[1] == 0x80) {
            printf("✓ MSB-first mode detected\n");
        } else if (buffer_putc[1] == 0x01) {
            printf("✓ LSB-first mode detected\n");
        } else {
            printf("✗ Unknown mode: 0x%02X\n", buffer_putc[1]);
        }
    } else {
        printf("✗ Wrong format\n");
    }
    
    return 0;
}
#include <cassert>
#include <fstream>
#include <iostream>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

#include "../src/BitReader.h"
#include "../src/BitWriter.h"

std::string readBitsFromFile(const std::string &filename, int bitCount) {
  std::ifstream in(filename, std::ios::binary);
  BitReader reader(in);

  std::string bits;
  bits.reserve(bitCount);

  bool bit;
  int count = 0;
  while (count < bitCount && reader.readBit(bit)) {
    bits += (bit ? '1' : '0');
    count++;
  }

  in.close();
  return bits;
}

void writeBitsToFile(const std::string &filename, const std::string &bits) {
  std::ofstream out(filename, std::ios::binary);
  assert(out.is_open());
  BitWriter writer(out);

  for (char bit : bits) {
    writer.writeBit(bit == '1');
  }

  writer.flush();
  out.close();
}

void testExactlyOneByte() {
  std::string bits = "10110010";
  std::string file = "data/test_bits_1.bin";

  writeBitsToFile(file, bits);
  std::string result = readBitsFromFile(file, static_cast<int>(bits.size()));

  assert(result == bits);
}

void testIncompleteLastByte() {
  std::string bits = "1011001";
  std::string file = "data/test_bits_2.bin";

  writeBitsToFile(file, bits);
  std::string result = readBitsFromFile(file, static_cast<int>(bits.size()));

  assert(result == bits);
}

void testSeveralBytes() {
  std::string bits = "101100100011011011001010";
  std::string file = "data/test_bits_3.bin";

  writeBitsToFile(file, bits);
  std::string result = readBitsFromFile(file, static_cast<int>(bits.size()));

  assert(result == bits);
}

void testAllZeros() {
  std::string bits = "0000000000000000";
  std::string file = "data/test_bits_4.bin";

  writeBitsToFile(file, bits);
  std::string result = readBitsFromFile(file, static_cast<int>(bits.size()));

  assert(result == bits);
}

void testAllOnes() {
  std::string bits = "1111111111111111";
  std::string file = "data/test_bits_5.bin";

  writeBitsToFile(file, bits);
  std::string result = readBitsFromFile(file, static_cast<int>(bits.size()));

  assert(result == bits);
}

void testAlternatingBits() {
  std::string bits = "010101010101010101010101";
  std::string file = "data/test_bits_1.bin";

  writeBitsToFile(file, bits);
  std::string result = readBitsFromFile(file, static_cast<int>(bits.size()));

  assert(result == bits);
}

void testSingleZeroBit() {
  std::string bits = "0";
  std::string file = "data/test_bits_1.bin";

  writeBitsToFile(file, bits);
  std::string result = readBitsFromFile(file, static_cast<int>(bits.size()));

  assert(result == bits);
}

void testSingleOneBit() {
  std::string bits = "1";
  std::string file = "data/test_bits_1.bin";

  writeBitsToFile(file, bits);
  std::string result = readBitsFromFile(file, static_cast<int>(bits.size()));

  assert(result == bits);
}

int main() {
  testExactlyOneByte();
  testIncompleteLastByte();
  testSeveralBytes();
  testAllZeros();
  testAllOnes();
  testAlternatingBits();
  testSingleZeroBit();
  testSingleOneBit();

  std::cout << "All bit I/O tests passed\n";
  return 0;

#include <iostream>

#include "../src/HuffmanTree.h"

void testBuildFrequency() {
  std::string text = "aaabbc";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);

  assert(freq['a'] == 3);
  assert(freq['b'] == 2);
  assert(freq['c'] == 1);
}

void testEncodeDecodeSimple() {
  std::string text = "abracadabra";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testSingleCharacter() {
  std::string text = "aaaaaaa";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testTwoCharactersWithEqualFrequency() {
  std::string text = "abababab";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);
  assert(codes.size() == 2);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testAllUniqueCharacters() {
  std::string text = "abcdefg";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testWithSpaces() {
  std::string text = "hello world";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testWithNewLines() {
  std::string text = "hello\nworld\nabc";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testWithTabsAndNewLines() {
  std::string text = "hello\tworld\nabc\n\txyz";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testPunctuationAndDigits() {
  std::string text = "12345!!!???...,,,000";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testHighlySkewedDistribution() {
  std::string text(1000, 'a');
  text += "bcdef";
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

void testBinaryLikeString() {
  std::string text;
  text.push_back('\0');
  text.push_back('\1');
  text.push_back('\2');
  text.push_back('\0');
  text.push_back('\xff');
  text.push_back('\n');
  text.push_back('\t');
  auto freq = HuffmanTree::buildFrequency(text);
  Node *root = HuffmanTree::buildTree(freq);
  std::unordered_map<unsigned char, std::string> codes;
  HuffmanTree::buildCodes(root, "", codes);
  std::string encoded = HuffmanTree::encodeText(text, codes);
  std::string decoded = HuffmanTree::decodeText(encoded, root);

  assert(decoded == text);

  HuffmanTree::deleteTree(root);
}

int main() {
  testBuildFrequency();
  testEncodeDecodeSimple();
  testSingleCharacter();
  testTwoCharactersWithEqualFrequency();
  testAllUniqueCharacters();
  testWithSpaces();
  testWithNewLines();
  testWithTabsAndNewLines();
  testPunctuationAndDigits();
  testHighlySkewedDistribution();
  testBinaryLikeString();

  std::cout << "All tests passed\n";
  return 0;
}#include <cassert>
#include <fstream>
#include <iostream>
#include <sstream>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

#include "../src/Compressor.h"
#include "../src/Decompressor.h"

std::string readFile(const std::string &filename) {
  std::ifstream in(filename, std::ios::binary);
  std::ostringstream buffer;
  buffer << in.rdbuf();
  return buffer.str();
}

void writeFile(const std::string &filename, const std::string &data) {
  std::ofstream out(filename, std::ios::binary);
  assert(out.is_open());
  out << data;
}

void testFullCycle(const std::string &text, const std::string &inputFile,
                   const std::string &compressedFile,
                   const std::string &outputFile) {
  writeFile(inputFile, text);
  Compressor::compress(inputFile, compressedFile);
  Decompressor::decompress(compressedFile, outputFile);

  std::string result = readFile(outputFile);
  assert(result == text);
}

void testBinaryFullCycle(const std::vector<unsigned char> &bytes,
                         const std::string &inputFile,
                         const std::string &compressedFile,
                         const std::string &outputFile) {
  std::ofstream out(inputFile, std::ios::binary);
  out.write(reinterpret_cast<const char *>(bytes.data()),
            static_cast<std::streamsize>(bytes.size()));
  out.close();

  Compressor::compress(inputFile, compressedFile);
  Decompressor::decompress(compressedFile, outputFile);

  std::ifstream in(outputFile, std::ios::binary);
  std::vector<unsigned char> result(bytes.size());
  in.read(reinterpret_cast<char *>(result.data()),
          static_cast<std::streamsize>(result.size()));

  assert(result == bytes);
}

int main() {
  testFullCycle("abracadabra", "data/test_input_1.txt",
                "data/test_output_1.bin", "data/test_result_1.txt");
  testFullCycle("aaaaaaa", "data/test_input_2.txt", "data/test_output_2.bin",
                "data/test_result_2.txt");
  testFullCycle("abababab", "data/test_input_3.txt", "data/test_output_3.bin",
                "data/test_result_3.txt");
  testFullCycle("text with spaces", "data/test_input_4.txt",
                "data/test_output_4.bin", "data/test_result_4.txt");
  testFullCycle("line1\nline2\nline3", "data/test_input_5.txt",
                "data/test_output_5.bin", "data/test_result_5.txt");
  testFullCycle("12345!!!???...,,,000", "data/test_input_6.txt",
                "data/test_output_6.bin", "data/test_result_6.txt");
  testFullCycle(std::string(5000, 'a') + "bcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz",
                "data/test_input_7.txt", "data/test_output_7.bin",
                "data/test_result_7.txt");
  testBinaryFullCycle(
      {0x00, 0x01, 0x02, 0x03, 0xff, 0x80, 0x7f, 0x00, 0x55, 0xaa},
      "data/test_input_8.bin", "data/test_output_8.bin",
      "data/test_result_8.bin");
  testBinaryFullCycle(
      [] {
        std::vector<unsigned char> bytes;
        bytes.reserve(256);
        for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
          bytes.push_back(static_cast<unsigned char>(i));
        }
        return bytes;
      }(),
      "data/test_input_9.bin", "data/test_output_9.bin",
      "data/test_result_9.bin");

  std::cout << "Integration tests passed\n";
  return 0;
}#include <stdio.h>

    int n = 1;
    // little endian if true
    if(*(char *)&n == 1) {...}

// Объявляем функцию print_abs, которая принимает целое число и возвращает 0
int print_abs(int input_value) {
    if (input_value < 0) { // Проверяем, отрицательное ли число
        int tmp_value;     // Объявляем временную переменную
        tmp_value = -input_value; // Меняем знак на противоположный
        printf("displaying %d\n", tmp_value); // Печатаем положительное значение
    } else {
        printf("displaying %d\n", input_value); // Печатаем исходное значение
    }
    return 0; // Функция завершает работу
}package com.example.weatherapp.`data`.local

    return performSuspending(__db, true, false) { _connection ->
